{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Y3TTm93KJTvvzPfAz4Y5ac","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→/**\n     2→ * Discord Bot API integration for automatic server/channel creation.\n     3→ *\n     4→ * When DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID are set, the system can:\n     5→ * 1. Generate bot invite URLs so authors can add the bot to their server\n     6→ * 2. Create text channels and invite links via Discord REST API\n     7→ * 3. Receive interaction events via webhook\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Flow:\n    10→ * - Author clicks \"Set up Discord\" → opens bot invite URL\n    11→ * - Author adds bot to their server\n    12→ * - Bot receives an interaction or the author triggers channel creation\n    13→ * - Bot creates a text channel + invite link, saves to listing\n    14→ */\n    15→\n    16→const DISCORD_API = \"https://discord.com/api/v10\";\n    17→\n    18→/**\n    19→ * Read bot credentials live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n    20→ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n    21→ * missing any env vars set or changed after server startup.\n    22→ */\n    23→function getBotToken(): string {\n    24→  return process.env.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN || \"\";\n    25→}\n    26→\n    27→function getClientId(): string {\n    28→  return process.env.DISCORD_CLIENT_ID || \"\";\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→export function isBotConfigured(): boolean {\n    32→  return getBotToken().length > 0 && getClientId().length > 0;\n    33→}\n    34→\n    35→/**\n    36→ * Validate a Discord snowflake ID (numeric string, 17-20 digits).\n    37→ * Used to prevent path traversal in Discord API URL construction.\n    38→ */\n    39→export function isValidSnowflake(id: string): boolean {\n    40→  return /^\\d{17,20}$/.test(id);\n    41→}\n    42→\n    43→/**\n    44→ * Call the Discord REST API.\n    45→ */\n    46→async function callApi<T = unknown>(\n    47→  endpoint: string,\n    48→  method: string = \"GET\",\n    49→  body?: Record<string, unknown>\n    50→): Promise<{ ok: boolean; data?: T; error?: string }> {\n    51→  try {\n    52→    const res = await fetch(`${DISCORD_API}${endpoint}`, {\n    53→      method,\n    54→      headers: {\n    55→        Authorization: `Bot ${getBotToken()}`,\n    56→        \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n    57→      },\n    58→      body: body ? JSON.stringify(body) : undefined,\n    59→    });\n    60→\n    61→    if (!res.ok) {\n    62→      const errData = await res.json().catch(() => ({}));\n    63→      return {\n    64→        ok: false,\n    65→        error: (errData as Record<string, string>).message || `HTTP ${res.status}`,\n    66→      };\n    67→    }\n    68→\n    69→    const data = (await res.json()) as T;\n    70→    return { ok: true, data };\n    71→  } catch (err) {\n    72→    return { ok: false, error: String(err) };\n    73→  }\n    74→}\n    75→\n    76→/**\n    77→ * Get bot user info.\n    78→ */\n    79→export async function getBotInfo(): Promise<{\n    80→  id: string;\n    81→  username: string;\n    82→} | null> {\n    83→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; username: string }>(\"/users/@me\");\n    84→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n    85→}\n    86→\n    87→/**\n    88→ * Generate a bot invite URL that includes the listing ID in the state parameter.\n    89→ * The bot needs permissions: Manage Channels, Create Instant Invite, Send Messages\n    90→ *\n    91→ * Permission bits:\n    92→ * - MANAGE_CHANNELS (0x10) = 16\n    93→ * - CREATE_INSTANT_INVITE (0x1) = 1\n    94→ * - SEND_MESSAGES (0x800) = 2048\n    95→ * - VIEW_CHANNEL (0x400) = 1024\n    96→ * Total: 3089\n    97→ */\n    98→export function generateBotInviteUrl(listingId: number): string {\n    99→  const permissions = 3089;\n   100→  const state = `listing_${listingId}`;\n   101→  return `https://discord.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=${getClientId()}&permissions=${permissions}&scope=bot&state=${encodeURIComponent(state)}`;\n   102→}\n   103→\n   104→/**\n   105→ * Create a text channel in a guild.\n   106→ */\n   107→export async function createTextChannel(\n   108→  guildId: string,\n   109→  name: string,\n   110→  topic?: string\n   111→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   112→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   113→    `/guilds/${guildId}/channels`,\n   114→    \"POST\",\n   115→    {\n   116→      name: name.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9-]/g, \"-\").slice(0, 100),\n   117→      type: 0, // GUILD_TEXT\n   118→      topic: topic || \"Bookmate reading group discussion channel\",\n   119→    }\n   120→  );\n   121→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   122→}\n   123→\n   124→/**\n   125→ * Create an invite for a channel.\n   126→ */\n   127→export async function createChannelInvite(\n   128→  channelId: string,\n   129→  maxAge: number = 0 // 0 = never expires\n   130→): Promise<string | null> {\n   131→  const res = await callApi<{ code: string }>(\n   132→    `/channels/${channelId}/invites`,\n   133→    \"POST\",\n   134→    {\n   135→      max_age: maxAge,\n   136→      max_uses: 0,\n   137→      unique: true,\n   138→    }\n   139→  );\n   140→  if (res.ok && res.data) {\n   141→    return `https://discord.gg/${res.data.code}`;\n   142→  }\n   143→  return null;\n   144→}\n   145→\n   146→/**\n   147→ * Send a message to a Discord channel.\n   148→ */\n   149→export async function sendChannelMessage(\n   150→  channelId: string,\n   151→  content: string\n   152→): Promise<boolean> {\n   153→  const res = await callApi(\n   154→    `/channels/${channelId}/messages`,\n   155→    \"POST\",\n   156→    { content }\n   157→  );\n   158→  return res.ok;\n   159→}\n   160→\n   161→/**\n   162→ * Get guild (server) info.\n   163→ */\n   164→export async function getGuild(\n   165→  guildId: string\n   166→): Promise<{ id: string; name: string } | null> {\n   167→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }>(\n   168→    `/guilds/${guildId}`\n   169→  );\n   170→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : null;\n   171→}\n   172→\n   173→/**\n   174→ * List guilds the bot is a member of.\n   175→ */\n   176→export async function getBotGuilds(): Promise<\n   177→  { id: string; name: string }[]\n   178→> {\n   179→  const res = await callApi<{ id: string; name: string }[]>(\n   180→    \"/users/@me/guilds\"\n   181→  );\n   182→  return res.ok && res.data ? res.data : [];\n   183→}\n   184→\n   185→/**\n   186→ * Parse listing ID from a state or payload string.\n   187→ * Expected format: \"listing_123\"\n   188→ */\n   189→export function parseListingIdFromState(state: string): number | null {\n   190→  const match = state.match(/^listing_(\\d+)$/);\n   191→  return match ? parseInt(match[1], 10) : null;\n   192→}\n   193→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"58faf82e-fa73-4448-83b8-669cfb2bbabd","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:21.137Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01LZyGbCehJKS2TCaC5y2xsX","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Listing {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  book_title: string;\n    10→  book_author: string;\n    11→  book_cover_url: string;\n    12→  language: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  max_group_size: number;\n    17→  requires_approval: number;\n    18→  platform_preference: string;\n    19→  member_count: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  created_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→export default function HomePage() {\n    25→  const [listings, setListings] = useState<Listing[]>([]);\n    26→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    27→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    28→\n    29→  // Search & filter state\n    30→  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    31→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"\");\n    32→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    33→  const [startDateFrom, setStartDateFrom] = useState(\"\");\n    34→  const [sort, setSort] = useState(\"newest\");\n    35→  const [filtersOpen, setFiltersOpen] = useState(false);\n    36→\n    37→  // Pagination state\n    38→  const [page, setPage] = useState(1);\n    39→  const [totalPages, setTotalPages] = useState(1);\n    40→  const [totalResults, setTotalResults] = useState(0);\n    41→\n    42→  const debounceRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    43→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    44→\n    45→  const fetchListings = useCallback(\n    46→    (query: string, format: string, sortBy: string, pace?: string, dateFrom?: string, pageNum?: number) => {\n    47→      // Abort any in-flight request to prevent stale responses overwriting newer ones\n    48→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    49→      const controller = new AbortController();\n    50→      abortRef.current = controller;\n    51→\n    52→      setLoading(true);\n    53→      const params = new URLSearchParams();\n    54→      if (query) params.set(\"q\", query);\n    55→      if (format) params.set(\"meeting_format\", format);\n    56→      if (pace) params.set(\"reading_pace\", pace);\n    57→      if (dateFrom) params.set(\"start_date_from\", dateFrom);\n    58→      if (sortBy) params.set(\"sort\", sortBy);\n    59→      if (pageNum && pageNum > 1) params.set(\"page\", String(pageNum));\n    60→\n    61→      const qs = params.toString();\n    62→      fetch(`/api/listings${qs ? `?${qs}` : \"\"}`, { signal: controller.signal })\n    63→        .then((r) => {\n    64→          if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load listings\");\n    65→          return r.json();\n    66→        })\n    67→        .then((data) => {\n    68→          if (controller.signal.aborted) return;\n    69→          setListings(data.listings || []);\n    70→          if (data.pagination) {\n    71→            setTotalPages(data.pagination.totalPages || 1);\n    72→            setTotalResults(data.pagination.total || 0);\n    73→          }\n    74→          setError(null);\n    75→          setLoading(false);\n    76→        })\n    77→        .catch((err) => {\n    78→          if ((err as Error).name === \"AbortError\") return;\n    79→          setError(err.message || \"Could not load listings. Please try again.\");\n    80→          setLoading(false);\n    81→        });\n    82→    },\n    83→    []\n    84→  );\n    85→\n    86→  // Initial fetch\n    87→  useEffect(() => {\n    88→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n    89→  }, [fetchListings]);\n    90→\n    91→  // Cleanup debounce timer and in-flight request on unmount\n    92→  useEffect(() => {\n    93→    return () => {\n    94→      if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n    95→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    96→    };\n    97→  }, []);\n    98→\n    99→  // Debounced search\n   100→  const handleSearchChange = (value: string) => {\n   101→    setSearchQuery(value);\n   102→    setPage(1);\n   103→    if (debounceRef.current) clearTimeout(debounceRef.current);\n   104→    debounceRef.current = setTimeout(() => {\n   105→      fetchListings(value, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   106→    }, 400);\n   107→  };\n   108→\n   109→  // Immediate filter changes\n   110→  const handleFormatChange = (value: string) => {\n   111→    setMeetingFormat(value);\n   112→    setPage(1);\n   113→    fetchListings(searchQuery, value, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   114→  };\n   115→\n   116→  const handlePaceChange = (value: string) => {\n   117→    setReadingPace(value);\n   118→    setPage(1);\n   119→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, value, startDateFrom, 1);\n   120→  };\n   121→\n   122→  const handleStartDateFromChange = (value: string) => {\n   123→    setStartDateFrom(value);\n   124→    setPage(1);\n   125→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, value, 1);\n   126→  };\n   127→\n   128→  const handleSortChange = (value: string) => {\n   129→    setSort(value);\n   130→    setPage(1);\n   131→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, value, readingPace, startDateFrom, 1);\n   132→  };\n   133→\n   134→  const handlePageChange = (newPage: number) => {\n   135→    setPage(newPage);\n   136→    fetchListings(searchQuery, meetingFormat, sort, readingPace, startDateFrom, newPage);\n   137→    window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: \"smooth\" });\n   138→  };\n   139→\n   140→  const clearFilters = () => {\n   141→    setSearchQuery(\"\");\n   142→    setMeetingFormat(\"\");\n   143→    setReadingPace(\"\");\n   144→    setStartDateFrom(\"\");\n   145→    setSort(\"newest\");\n   146→    setPage(1);\n   147→    fetchListings(\"\", \"\", \"newest\", \"\", \"\", 1);\n   148→  };\n   149→\n   150→  const hasActiveFilters = searchQuery || meetingFormat || readingPace || startDateFrom || sort !== \"newest\";\n   151→\n   152→  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n   153→    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n   154→      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n   155→      text: \"Text chat\",\n   156→      mixed: \"Mixed\",\n   157→    };\n   158→    return labels[f] || f;\n   159→  };\n   160→\n   161→  return (\n   162→    <div>\n   163→      <div className=\"text-center mb-6 sm:mb-8 mt-2 sm:mt-4\">\n   164→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-4xl mb-2 sm:mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>\n   165→          Find your reading companion\n   166→        </h1>\n   167→        <p\n   168→          className=\"text-sm sm:text-lg max-w-xl mx-auto\"\n   169→          style={{\n   170→            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   171→            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   172→          }}\n   173→        >\n   174→          Browse open reading groups, join one that matches your pace, and\n   175→          connect on Telegram to read together.\n   176→        </p>\n   177→      </div>\n   178→\n   179→      {/* Search & Filter Bar */}\n   180→      <div className=\"mb-6\">\n   181→        <div className=\"flex gap-3 items-center\">\n   182→          <div className=\"flex-1 relative\">\n   183→            <input\n   184→              type=\"text\"\n   185→              placeholder=\"Search by book title or author...\"\n   186→              value={searchQuery}\n   187→              onChange={(e) => handleSearchChange(e.target.value)}\n   188→              className=\"input-field\"\n   189→              style={{ paddingLeft: \"2.5rem\" }}\n   190→            />\n   191→            <svg\n   192→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   193→              style={{\n   194→                position: \"absolute\",\n   195→                left: \"0.75rem\",\n   196→                top: \"50%\",\n   197→                transform: \"translateY(-50%)\",\n   198→                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   199→                width: \"1.125rem\",\n   200→                height: \"1.125rem\",\n   201→                pointerEvents: \"none\",\n   202→              }}\n   203→              fill=\"none\"\n   204→              stroke=\"currentColor\"\n   205→              strokeWidth={2}\n   206→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\"\n   207→            >\n   208→              <circle cx={11} cy={11} r={8} />\n   209→              <line x1={21} y1={21} x2={16.65} y2={16.65} />\n   210→            </svg>\n   211→          </div>\n   212→          <button\n   213→            onClick={() => setFiltersOpen(!filtersOpen)}\n   214→            className=\"btn-secondary\"\n   215→            aria-expanded={filtersOpen}\n   216→            aria-controls=\"filter-panel\"\n   217→            style={{\n   218→              display: \"flex\",\n  224→          >\n   225→            <svg\n   226→              aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   227→              width=\"16\"\n   228→              height=\"16\"\n   229→              viewBox=\"0 0 24 [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n    84→  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n    85→\n    86→  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    87→    try {\n    88→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    89→      const data = await res.json();\n    90→      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    91→        setListing(data.listing);\n    92→        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n    93→        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n    94→      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n    95→        setNotAvailable(true);\n    96→      } else {\n    97→        setFetchError(true);\n    98→      }\n    99→    } catch {\n   100→      setFetchError(true);\n   101→    } finally {\n   102→      setLoading(false);\n   103→    }\n   104→  }, [id]);\n   105→\n   106→  useEffect(() => {\n   107→    fetchListing();\n   108→  }, [fetchListing]);\n   109→\n   110→  const handleDelete = async () => {\n   111→    setDeleting(true);\n   112→    setError(\"\");\n   113→    try {\n   114→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n   115→      const data = await res.json();\n   116→      if (res.ok) {\n   117→        router.push(\"/\");\n   118→      } else {\n   119→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");\n   120→        setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   121→      }\n   122→    } catch {\n   123→      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n   124→      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n   125→    } finally {\n   126→      setDeleting(false);\n   127→    }\n   128→  };\n   129→\n   130→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   131→    if (!id) return;\n   132→    try {\n   133→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   134→      const data = await res.json();\n   135→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   136→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   137→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   138→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   139→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   140→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   141→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   142→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   143→        }\n   144→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   145→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   146→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   147→      }\n   148→    } catch {\n   149→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   150→    }"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"1f1b0f42-6039-44a7-b86c-523c38548530","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:29.357Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_011pmUUGLyFnLV6hWtM8KA3A","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→interface ReadingRow {\n     6→  id: number;\n     7→  book_title: string;\n     8→  book_author: string;\n     9→  book_cover_url: string;\n    10→  reading_pace: string;\n    11→  start_date: string;\n    12→  meeting_format: string;\n    13→  is_full: number;\n    14→  telegram_link: string;\n    15→  discord_link: string;\n    16→  member_count: number;\n    17→  max_group_size: number;\n    18→  author_name: string;\n    19→  joined_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export async function GET() {\n    23→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    24→  if (!session) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  // Get all listings the user is a member of (including ones they authored)\n    29→  const readings = db.prepare(`\n    30→    SELECT\n    31→      l.id,\n    32→      l.book_title,\n    33→      l.book_author,\n    34→      l.book_cover_url,\n    35→      l.reading_pace,\n    36→      l.start_date,\n    37→      l.meeting_format,\n    38→      l.is_full,\n    39→      l.telegram_link,\n    40→      l.discord_link,\n    41→      l.max_group_size,\n    42→      u.display_name as author_name,\n    43→      lm.joined_at,\n    44→      (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n    45→    FROM listing_members lm\n    46→    JOIN listings l ON l.id = lm.listing_id\n    47→    JOIN users u ON u.id = l.author_id\n    48→    WHERE lm.user_id = ?\n    49→    ORDER BY lm.joined_at DESC\n    50→    LIMIT 200\n    51→  `).all(session.userId) as ReadingRow[];\n    52→\n    53→  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n    54→\n    55→  // Reading history: completed groups (full + start_date in the past)\n    56→  // Upcoming: not yet started and not full\n    57→  // Active: everything else that has started or is full (but not completed)\n    58→  const isHistory = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 1 && r.start_date < today;\n    59→  const isUpcoming = (r: ReadingRow) => r.is_full === 0 && r.start_date > today;\n    60→\n    61→  const history = readings.filter(isHistory);\n    62→  const upcoming = readings.filter(isUpcoming);\n    63→  const active = readings.filter(\n    64→    (r) => !isHistory(r) && !isUpcoming(r) && (r.is_full === 1 || r.start_date <= today)\n    65→  );\n    66→\n    67→  return NextResponse.json({\n    68→    active,\n    69→    history,\n    70→    upcoming,\n    71→    total: readings.length,\n    72→  });\n    73→}\n    74→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"54340d57-3681-4ca0-9093-84bbb840a140","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:29.535Z"}

Please try again.\");\n   231→    } finally {\n   232→      setApplying(false);\n   233→    }\n   234→  };\n   235→\n   236→  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n   237→    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n   238→    setError(\"\");\n   239→    try {\n   240→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n   241→        method: \"PATCH\",\n   242→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   243→        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n   244→      });\n   245→      const data = await res.json();\n   246→      if (!res.ok) {\n   247→        setError(data.error);\n   248→        return;\n   249→      }\n   250→      await fetchListing();\n   251→    } catch {\n   252→      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n   253→    } finally {\n   254→      setDecidingId(null);\n   255→    }\n   256→  };\n   257→\n   258→  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n   259→    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n   260→  };\n   261→\n   262→  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n   263→    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n   264→    : \"\";\n   265→\n   266→  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n   267→    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n   268→    setTelegramSaving(true);\n   269→    setError(\"\");\n   270→    try {\n   271→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n   272→        method: \"POST\",\n   273→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n   274→        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n   275→      });\n   276→      const data = await res.json();\n   277→      if (!res.ok) {\n   278→        setError(data.error);\n   279→        return;\n   280→      }\n   281→      await fetchListing();\n   282→    } catch {\n   283→      setError(\"Failed to save link. {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XFfEfk7vKRRs3MYLrzJgpq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n     9→ * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    13→  if (!session) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json(\n    15→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    16→      { status: 401 }\n    17→    );\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n    21→  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n    22→  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n    23→\n    24→  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json(\n    26→      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n    27→      { status: 400 }\n    28→    );\n    29→  }\n    30→\n    31→  // Average score\n    32→  const stats = db\n    33→    .prepare(\n    34→      `SELECT\n    35→        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n    36→        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n    37→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n    38→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n    39→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n    40→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n    41→        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n    42→       FROM ratings\n    43→       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    44→    )\n    45→    .get(userId) as {\n    46→      total_ratings: number;\n    47→      average_score: number | null;\n    48→      five_star: number;\n    49→      four_star: number;\n    50→      three_star: number;\n    51→      two_star: number;\n    52→      one_star: number;\n    53→    };\n    54→\n    55→  // Number of completed groups\n    56→  const completedGroups = db\n    57→    .prepare(\n    58→      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n    59→       FROM listing_members lm\n    60→       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n    61→       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    62→    )\n    63→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    64→\n    65→  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n    66→  const groupsRated = db\n    67→    .prepare(\n    68→      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n    69→       FROM ratings\n    70→       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    71→    )\n    72→    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n    73→\n    74→  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n    75→  const recentRatings = db\n    76→    .prepare(\n    77→      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n    78→       FROM ratings r\n    79→       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n    80→       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n    81→       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n    82→       LIMIT 10`\n    83→    )\n    84→    .all(userId) as {\n    85→      score: number;\n    86→      comment: string;\n    87→      created_at: string;\n    88→      book_title: string;\n    89→    }[];\n    90→\n    91→  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n    92→  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    93→    ? recentRatings\n    94→    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n    95→        score,\n    96→        created_at,\n    97→        book_title,\n    98→      }));\n    99→\n   100→  return NextResponse.json({\n   101→    reputation: {\n   102→      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n   103→      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n   104→      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n   105→      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n   106→      breakdown: {\n   107→        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n   108→        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n   109→        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n   110→        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n   111→        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n   112→      },\n   113→      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n   114→    },\n   115→  });\n   116→}\n   117→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"51c59106-cc3f-4479-b215-0db88d38cf9d","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:33.707Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_014wa8oEcScGiNG6jxaPd7GE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     6→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     7→\n     8→interface ReadingItem {\n     9→  id: number;\n    10→  book_title: string;\n    11→  book_author: string;\n    12→  book_cover_url: string;\n    13→  reading_pace: string;\n    14→  start_date: string;\n    15→  meeting_format: string;\n    16→  is_full: number;\n    17→  telegram_link: string;\n    18→  member_count: number;\n    19→  max_group_size: number;\n    20→  author_name: string;\n    21→  joined_at: string;\n    22→}\n    23→\n    24→interface Reputation {\n    25→  averageScore: number;\n    26→  totalRatings: number;\n    27→  completedGroups: number;\n    28→  groupsRated: number;\n    29→  breakdown: Record<number, number>;\n    30→  recentRatings: {\n    31→    score: number;\n    32→    comment: string;\n    33→    created_at: string;\n    34→    book_title: string;\n    35→  }[];\n    36→}\n    37→\n    38→type TabKey = \"profile\" | \"reading\" | \"genres\" | \"reputation\";\n    39→\n    40→export default function ProfilePage() {\n    41→  const router = useRouter();\n    42→  const [displayName, setDisplayName] = useState(\"\");\n    43→  const [bio, setBio] = useState(\"\");\n    44→  const [email, setEmail] = useState(\"\");\n    45→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    46→  const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false);\n    47→  const [message, setMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    48→\n    49→  // Tab state\n    50→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<TabKey>(\"profile\");\n    51→\n    52→  // Reading activity\n    53→  const [active, setActive] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    54→  const [history, setHistory] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    55→  const [upcoming, setUpcoming] = useState<ReadingItem[]>([]);\n    56→  const [readingLoading, setReadingLoading] = useState(false);\n    57→\n    58→  // Genres\n    59→  const [userGenres, setUserGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    60→  const [availableGenres, setAvailableGenres] = useState<string[]>([]);\n    61→  const [genresLoading, setGenresLoading] = useState(false);\n    62→  const [genresSaving, setGenresSaving] = useState(false);\n    63→  const [genresMessage, setGenresMessage] = useState(\"\");\n    64→\n    65→  // Reputation\n    66→  const [reputation, setReputation] = useState<Reputation | null>(null);\n    67→  const [reputationLoading, setReputationLoading] = useState(false);\n    68→\n    69→  // Track which tabs have been fetched to avoid redundant requests\n    70→  const fetchedTabs = useRef<Set<string>>(new Set());\n    71→\n    72→  useEffect(() => {\n    73→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    74→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    75→      .then((data) => {\n    76→        if (!data.user) {\n    77→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    78→          return;\n    79→        }\n    80→        setDisplayName(data.user.displayName);\n    81→        setBio(data.user.bio || \"\");\n    82→        setEmail(data.user.email);\n    83→        setLoading(false);\n    84→      })\n    85→      .catch(() => {\n    86→        // Network error — can't verify auth, redirect to login\n    87→        router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    88→      });\n    89→  }, [router]);\n    90→\n    91→  const fetchReading = useCallback(() => {\n    92→    setReadingLoading(true);\n    93→    fetch(\"/api/profile/reading\")\n    94→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    95→      .then((data) => {\n    96→        setActive(data.active || []);\n    97→        setHistory(data.history || []);\n    98→        setUpcoming(data.upcoming || []);\n    99→        setReadingLoading(false);\n   100→      })"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"034e49bb-b90b-4069-823c-d690ab6f10b0","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:37.645Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01PXLUu6SLCF8kxz564Cfrf8","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, setWebhook, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/telegram\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * POST /api/telegram/setup\n     7→ *\n     8→ * Sets up the Telegram webhook. Should be called once after deployment.\n     9→ * Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL env vars.\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Protected by a setup secret to prevent unauthorized access.\n    12→ */\n    13→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    14→  const setupSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET;\n    15→  if (!setupSecret) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_SETUP_SECRET not configured\" },\n    18→      { status: 500 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  const body = await req.json();\n    23→  if (!body.secret || typeof body.secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(body.secret, setupSecret)) {\n    24→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 403 });\n    25→  }\n    26→\n    27→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    28→    return NextResponse.json(\n    29→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN not configured\" },\n    30→      { status: 500 }\n    31→    );\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const webhookUrl = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL;\n    35→  if (!webhookUrl) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL not configured\" },\n    38→      { status: 500 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const bot = await getBotInfo();\n    43→  if (!bot) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Telegram API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    46→      { status: 500 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const success = await setWebhook(webhookUrl);\n    51→  if (!success) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      { error: \"Failed to set webhook\" },\n    54→      { status: 500 }\n    55→    );\n    56→  }\n    57→\n    58→  return NextResponse.json({\n    59→    ok: true,\n    60→    bot: { username: bot.username, id: bot.id },\n    61→    webhookUrl,\n    62→  });\n    63→}\n    64→\n    65→/**\n    66→ * GET /api/telegram/setup\n    67→ *\n    68→ * Returns the current Telegram bot configuration status.\n    69→ */\n    70→export async function GET() {\n    71→  return NextResponse.json({\n    72→    botConfigured: isBotConfigured(),\n    73→    webhookUrlConfigured: !!process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_URL,\n    74→  });\n    75→}\n    76→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"20967eea-cd3d-41c4-a9a4-80dd629104de","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:40.852Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013nXATHz422o2JjvxzVy3Ns","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const AVAILABLE_GENRES = [\n     6→  \"Literary Fiction\",\n     7→  \"Science Fiction\",\n     8→  \"Fantasy\",\n     9→  \"Mystery\",\n    10→  \"Thriller\",\n    11→  \"Romance\",\n    12→  \"Historical Fiction\",\n    13→  \"Horror\",\n    14→  \"Dystopian\",\n    15→  \"Adventure\",\n    16→  \"Contemporary Fiction\",\n    17→  \"Magical Realism\",\n    18→  \"Classics\",\n    19→  \"Short Stories\",\n    20→  \"Young Adult\",\n    21→  \"Graphic Novels\",\n    22→];\n    23→\n    24→interface GenreRow {\n    25→  genre: string;\n    26→}\n    27→\n    28→export async function GET() {\n    29→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    30→  if (!session) {\n    31→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    32→  }\n    33→\n    34→  const userGenres = db.prepare(\n    35→    \"SELECT genre FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ? ORDER BY genre\"\n    36→  ).all(session.userId) as GenreRow[];\n    37→\n    38→  return NextResponse.json({\n    39→    genres: userGenres.map((g) => g.genre),\n    40→    available: AVAILABLE_GENRES,\n    41→  });\n    42→}\n    43→\n    44→export async function PUT(req: NextRequest) {\n    45→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    46→  if (!session) {\n    47→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  const { genres } = await req.json();\n    51→\n    52→  if (!Array.isArray(genres)) {\n    53→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"genres must be an array\" }, { status: 400 });\n    54→  }\n    55→\n    56→  // Validate all genres\n    57→  const validGenres = genres.filter((g: string) => AVAILABLE_GENRES.includes(g));\n    58→\n    59→  // Replace all genres in a transaction\n    60→  const updateGenres = db.transaction(() => {\n    61→    db.prepare(\"DELETE FROM user_genres WHERE user_id = ?\").run(session.userId);\n    62→    const insert = db.prepare(\"INSERT INTO user_genres (user_id, genre) VALUES (?, ?)\");\n    63→    for (const genre of validGenres) {\n    64→      insert.run(session.userId, genre);\n    65→    }\n    66→  });\n    67→\n    68→  updateGenres();\n    69→\n    70→  return NextResponse.json({ genres: validGenres });\n    71→}\n    72→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"777b1851-c5c2-4824-8d21-57c65e4a2b36","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:41.147Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Gr9cjQXRxbN3TMnh3NqBQB","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { timingSafeEqual } from \"crypto\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Constant-time string comparison to prevent timing side-channel attacks.\n     5→ * Use this for comparing secrets (webhook tokens, setup secrets, etc.)\n     6→ */\n     7→export function safeCompare(a: string, b: string): boolean {\n     8→  const bufA = Buffer.from(a);\n     9→  const bufB = Buffer.from(b);\n    10→  if (bufA.length !== bufB.length) {\n    11→    // Do a dummy comparison to add some constant work, though this does not\n    12→    // fully mask length differences (bufA self-compare time varies with length).\n    13→    // In practice, the secrets compared here are fixed-length env vars.\n    14→    timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufA);\n    15→    return false;\n    16→  }\n    17→  return timingSafeEqual(bufA, bufB);\n    18→}\n    19→\n    20→/**\n    21→ * Escape user-controlled content for safe embedding in HTML emails.\n    22→ */\n    23→export function escapeHtmlForEmail(text: string): string {\n    24→  return text\n    25→    .replace(/&/g, \"&amp;\")\n    26→    .replace(/</g, \"&lt;\")\n    27→    .replace(/>/g, \"&gt;\")\n    28→    .replace(/\"/g, \"&quot;\")\n    29→    .replace(/'/g, \"&#039;\");\n    30→}\n    31→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"2702d105-9800-4f46-8846-6f595582fefc","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:43.815Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01VqeheUNWdReDMhDJsA4J5L","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\n     4→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     5→\n     6→interface BookResult {\n     7→  key: string;\n     8→  title: string;\n     9→  author_name?: string[];\n    10→  cover_i?: number;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→interface Props {\n    14→  onSelect: (book: {\n    15→    title: string;\n    16→    author: string;\n    17→    coverUrl: string;\n    18→    olid: string;\n    19→  }) => void;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→export default function BookSearch({ onSelect }: Props) {\n    23→  const [query, setQuery] = useState(\"\");\n    24→  const [results, setResults] = useState<BookResult[]>([]);\n    25→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    26→  const [open, setOpen] = useState(false);\n    27→  const [searchError, setSearchError] = useState(false);\n    28→  const [activeIndex, setActiveIndex] = useState(-1);\n    29→  const timeoutRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined);\n    30→  const abortRef = useRef<AbortController>(undefined);\n    31→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    32→  const listboxRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    33→\n    34→  useEffect(() => {\n    35→    const handler = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    36→      if (\n    37→        containerRef.current &&\n    38→        !containerRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)\n    39→      ) {\n    40→        setOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handler);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  useEffect(() => {\n    48→    if (query.length < 3) {\n    49→      setResults([]);\n    50→      if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    51→      return;\n    52→    }\n    53→\n    54→    if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    55→    if (abortRef.current) abortRef.current.abort();\n    56→\n    57→    const controller = new AbortController();\n    58→    abortRef.current = controller;\n    59→\n    60→    timeoutRef.current = setTimeout(async () => {\n    61→      setLoading(true);\n    62→      setSearchError(false);\n    63→      try {\n    64→        const res = await fetch(\n    65→          `https://openlibrary.org/search.json?q=${encodeURIComponent(query)}&limit=8&fields=key,title,author_name,cover_i`,\n    66→          { signal: controller.signal }\n    67→        );\n    68→        const data = await res.json();\n    69→        setResults(data.docs || []);\n    70→        setOpen(true);\n    71→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n    72→      } catch (err) {\n    73→        if ((err as Error).name !== \"AbortError\") {\n    74→          setResults([]);\n    75→          setSearchError(true);\n    76→        }\n    77→      } finally {\n    78→        if (!controller.signal.aborted) {\n    79→          setLoading(false);\n    80→        }\n    81→      }\n    82→    }, 400);\n    83→\n    84→    return () => {\n    85→      if (timeoutRef.current) clearTimeout(timeoutRef.current);\n    86→      controller.abort();\n    87→    };\n    88→  }, [query]);\n    89→\n    90→  const handleSelect = (book: BookResult) => {\n    91→    const olid = book.key.replace(\"/works/\", \"\");\n    92→    onSelect({\n    93→      title: book.title,\n    94→      author: book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\",\n    95→      coverUrl: book.cover_i\n    96→        ? `https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-M.jpg`\n    97→        : \"\",\n    98→      olid,\n    99→    });\n   100→    setQuery(book.title);\n   101→    setOpen(false);\n   102→    setActiveIndex(-1);\n   103→  };\n   104→\n   105→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {\n   106→    if (!open || results.length === 0) return;\n   107→\n   108→    switch (e.key) {\n   109→      case \"ArrowDown\":\n   110→        e.preventDefault();\n   111→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev < results.length - 1 ? prev + 1 : 0));\n   112→        break;\n   113→      case \"ArrowUp\":\n   114→        e.preventDefault();\n   115→        setActiveIndex((prev) => (prev > 0 ? prev - 1 : results.length - 1));\n   116→        break;\n   117→      case \"Enter\":\n   118→        e.preventDefault();\n   119→        if (activeIndex >= 0 && activeIndex < results.length) {\n   120→          handleSelect(results[activeIndex]);\n   121→        }\n   122→        break;\n   123→      case \"Escape\":\n   124→        setOpen(false);\n   125→        setActiveIndex(-1);\n   126→        break;\n   127→    }\n   128→  };\n   129→\n   130→  // Scroll active option into view\n   131→  useEffect(() => {\n   132→    if (activeIndex >= 0 && listboxRef.current) {\n   133→      const activeEl = listboxRef.current.children[activeIndex] as HTMLElement;\n   134→      if (activeEl) {\n   135→        activeEl.scrollIntoView({ block: \"nearest\" });\n   136→      }\n   137→    }\n   138→  }, [activeIndex]);\n   139→\n   140→  const activeDescendant =\n   141→    activeIndex >= 0 && results[activeIndex]\n   142→      ? `book-option-${results[activeIndex].key}`\n   143→      : undefined;\n   144→\n   145→  return (\n   146→    <div ref={containerRef} className=\"relative\">\n   147→      <input\n   148→        type=\"text\"\n   149→        className=\"input-field\"\n   150→        value={query}\n   151→        onChange={(e) => setQuery(e.target.value)}\n   152→        onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}\n   153→        placeholder=\"Search for a book title...\"\n   154→        onFocus={() => results.length > 0 && setOpen(true)}\n   155→        role=\"combobox\"\n   156→        aria-expanded={open && results.length > 0}\n   157→        aria-haspopup=\"listbox\"\n   158→        aria-controls=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   159→        aria-activedescendant={activeDescendant}\n   160→        aria-label=\"Search for a book\"\n   161→        aria-autocomplete=\"list\"\n   162→      />\n   163→      {loading && (\n   164→        <div\n   165→          className=\"absolute right-3 top-3 text-xs\"\n   166→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   167→          role=\"status\"\n   168→          aria-live=\"polite\"\n   169→        >\n   170→          Searching...\n   171→        </div>\n   172→      )}\n   173→\n   174→      {searchError && !loading && (\n   175→        <div\n   176→          className=\"text-xs mt-1\"\n   177→          style={{ color: \"var(--color-error, #dc2626)\" }}\n   178→          role=\"alert\"\n   179→        >\n   180→          Book search is unavailable. Please try again later.\n   181→        </div>\n   182→      )}\n   183→\n   184→      {open && results.length > 0 && (\n   185→        <div\n   186→          ref={listboxRef}\n   187→          id=\"book-search-listbox\"\n   188→          role=\"listbox\"\n   189→          aria-label=\"Book search results\"\n   190→          className=\"absolute z-10 w-full mt-1 card shadow-lg max-h-72 overflow-y-auto\"\n   191→          style={{ padding: \"0.5rem 0\" }}\n   192→        >\n   193→          {results.map((book, index) => (\n   194→            <div\n   195→              key={book.key}\n   196→              id={`book-option-${book.key}`}\n   197→              role=\"option\"\n   198→              aria-selected={index === activeIndex}\n   199→              onClick={() => handleSelect(book)}\n   200→              className=\"w-full text-left px-4 py-2 hover:bg-gray-50 flex items-center gap-3 cursor-pointer\"\n   201→              style={{\n   202→                backgroundColor: index === activeIndex ? \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.04)\" : undefined,\n   203→              }}\n   204→            >\n   205→              {book.cover_i ? (\n   206→                <Image\n   207→                  src={`https://covers.openlibrary.org/b/id/${book.cover_i}-S.jpg`}\n   208→                  alt={`Cover of ${book.title}`}\n   209→                  width={32}\n   210→                  height={48}\n   211→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 object-cover rounded\"\n   212→                />\n   213→              ) : (\n   214→                <div\n   215→                  className=\"w-8 h-12 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-sm\"\n   216→                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-border)\" }}\n   217→                  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n   218→                >\n   219→                  <span role=\"img\" aria-hidden=\"true\">📖</span>\n   220→                </div>\n   221→              )}\n   222→              <div className=\"min-w-0\">\n   223→                <div\n   224→                  className=\"text-sm font-semibold truncate\"\n   225→                  style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n   226→                >\n   227→                  {book.title}\n   228→                </div>\n   229→                <div\n   230→                  className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n   231→                  style={{\n   232→                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n   233→                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n   234→                  }}\n   235→                >\n   236→                  {book.author_name?.[0] || \"Unknown author\"}\n   237→                </div>\n   238→              </div>\n   239→            </div>\n   240→          ))}\n   241→        </div>\n   242→      )}\n   243→    </div>\n   244→  );\n   245→}\n   246→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"f3639bce-f85f-40cc-9a4f-169e538222f4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:43.996Z"}

\"react\";\n     4→import { useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookSearch from \"@/components/BookSearch\";\n     6→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     7→\n     8→export default function CreateListingPage() {\n     9→  const router = useRouter();\n    10→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    12→\n    13→  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n    14→  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n    15→  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n    16→  const [bookOlid, setBookOlid] = useState(\"\");\n    17→  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n    18→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    19→  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n    20→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n    21→  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n    22→  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n    23→  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n    24→\n    25→  const handleBookSelect = (book: {\n    26→    title: string;\n    27→    author: string;\n    28→    coverUrl: string;\n    29→    olid: string;\n    30→  }) => {\n    31→    setBookTitle(book.title);\n    32→    setBookAuthor(book.author);\n    33→    setBookCoverUrl(book.coverUrl);\n    34→    setBookOlid(book.olid);\n    35→  };\n    36→\n    37→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    38→    e.preventDefault();\n    39→    setError(\"\");\n    40→    setLoading(true);\n    41→\n    42→    try {\n    43→      const res = await fetch(\"/api/listings/create\", {\n    44→        method: \"POST\",\n    45→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    46→        body: JSON.stringify({\n    47→          bookTitle,\n    48→          bookAuthor,\n    49→          bookCoverUrl,\n    50→          bookOlid,\n    51→          language,\n    52→          readingPace,\n    53→          startDate,\n    54→          meetingFormat,\n    55→          maxGroupSize,\n    56→          requiresApproval,\n    57→          platformPreference,\n    58→        }),\n    59→      });\n    60→\n    61→      const data = await res.json();\n    62→\n    63→      if (!res.ok) {\n    64→        if (res.status === 401) {\n    65→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    66→          return;\n    67→        }\n    68→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to create listing\");\n    69→        return;\n    70→      }\n    71→\n    72→      router.push(`/listings/${data.id}`);\n    73→    } catch {\n    74→      setError(\"Something went wrong. } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import Image from \"next/image\";\n     6→\n     7→export default function EditListingPage() {\n     8→  const { id } = useParams();\n     9→  const router = useRouter();\n    10→  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n    11→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n    12→  const [fetching, setFetching] = useState(true);\n    13→  const [fetchFailed, setFetchFailed] = useState(false);\n    14→\n    15→  const [bookTitle, setBookTitle] = useState(\"\");\n    16→  const [bookAuthor, setBookAuthor] = useState(\"\");\n    17→  const [bookCoverUrl, setBookCoverUrl] = useState(\"\");\n    18→  const [language, setLanguage] = useState(\"English\");\n    19→  const [readingPace, setReadingPace] = useState(\"\");\n    20→  const [startDate, setStartDate] = useState(\"\");\n    21→  const [meetingFormat, setMeetingFormat] = useState(\"text\");\n    22→  const [maxGroupSize, setMaxGroupSize] = useState(\"4\");\n    23→  const [requiresApproval, setRequiresApproval] = useState(false);\n    24→  const [platformPreference, setPlatformPreference] = useState(\"telegram\");\n    25→  const [memberCount, setMemberCount] = useState(1);\n    26→\n    27→  useEffect(() => {\n    28→    async function fetchListing() {\n    29→      try {\n    30→        const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n    31→        const data = await res.json();\n    32→        if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n    33→          const l = data.listing;\n    34→          if (!l.isAuthor) {\n    35→            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n    36→            return;\n    37→          }\n    38→          // Cannot edit if platform link shared\n    39→          if (l.telegram_link || l.discord_link) {\n    40→            router.push(`/listings/${id}`);\n    41→            return;\n    42→          }\n    43→          setBookTitle(l.book_title);\n    44→          setBookAuthor(l.book_author);\n    45→          setBookCoverUrl(l.book_cover_url || \"\");\n    46→          setLanguage(l.language || \"English\");\n    47→          setReadingPace(l.reading_pace || \"\");\n    48→          setStartDate(l.start_date || \"\");\n    49→          setMeetingFormat(l.meeting_format || \"text\");\n    50→          setMaxGroupSize(String(l.max_group_size || 4));\n    51→          setRequiresApproval(!!l.requires_approval);\n    52→          setPlatformPreference(l.platform_preference || \"telegram\");\n    53→          setMemberCount(l.memberCount || 1);\n    54→        } else if (res.status === 401) {\n    55→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    56→        } else {\n    57→          setError(\"Listing not found\");\n    58→          setFetchFailed(true);\n    59→        }\n    60→      } catch {\n    61→        setError(\"Failed to load listing\");\n    62→        setFetchFailed(true);\n    63→      } finally {\n    64→        setFetching(false);\n    65→      }\n    66→    }\n    67→    fetchListing();\n    68→  }, [id, router]);\n    69→\n    70→  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    71→    e.preventDefault();\n    72→    setError(\"\");\n    73→    setLoading(true);\n    74→\n    75→    try {\n    76→      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, {\n    77→        method: \"PATCH\",\n    78→        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    79→        body: JSON.stringify({\n    80→          language,\n    81→          readingPace,\n    82→          startDate,\n    83→          meetingFormat,\n    84→          maxGroupSize,\n    85→          requiresApproval,\n    86→          platformPreference,\n    87→        }),\n    88→      });\n    89→\n    90→      const data = await res.json();\n    91→\n    92→      if (!res.ok) {\n    93→        if (res.status === 401) {\n    94→          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n    95→          return;\n    96→        }\n    97→        setError(data.error || \"Failed to update listing\");\n    98→        return;\n    99→      }\n   100→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"917f5fac-f738-40aa-9a31-1fcf63d3d001","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:48.276Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013mK8DZHasb7HtEjmkiW9cz","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     3→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await getSession();\n     7→\n     8→  if (!session.userId) {\n     9→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    10→  }\n    11→\n    12→  const user = db\n    13→    .prepare(\"SELECT id, email, display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = ?\")\n    14→    .get(session.userId) as\n    15→    | { id: number; email: string; display_name: string; bio: string }\n    16→    | undefined;\n    17→\n    18→  if (!user) {\n    19→    await session.destroy();\n    20→    return NextResponse.json({ user: null });\n    21→  }\n    22→\n    23→  // Include unread notification count to avoid a second round-trip from the Navbar\n    24→  const unread = db\n    25→    .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\")\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    user: {\n    30→      id: user.id,\n    31→      email: user.email,\n    32→      displayName: user.display_name,\n    33→      bio: user.bio,\n    34→      unreadNotificationCount: unread.count,\n    35→    },\n    36→  });\n    37→}\n    38→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"8938e5d7-b6d9-42f5-a7d1-fea4efdb6cac","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:51.527Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CAWBrPNN8MkjXv9xFQz9Zc","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→const startTime = Date.now();\n     6→\n     7→export async function GET() {\n     8→  try {\n     9→    // Check database connectivity\n    10→    const dbCheck = db.prepare(\"SELECT 1 AS ok\").get() as { ok: number } | undefined;\n    11→    const dbOk = dbCheck?.ok === 1;\n    12→\n    13→    const response: Record<string, unknown> = {\n    14→      status: \"healthy\",\n    15→      uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    16→      database: dbOk ? \"connected\" : \"error\",\n    17→      timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    18→    };\n    19→\n    20→    // Only expose detailed stats to authenticated users\n    21→    try {\n    22→      const session = await getSession();\n    23→      if (session?.userId) {\n    24→        const stats = db.prepare(`\n    25→          SELECT\n    26→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users) AS users,\n    27→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings) AS listings,\n    28→            (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listings WHERE is_full = 0) AS open_listings\n    29→        `).get() as { users: number; listings: number; open_listings: number };\n    30→\n    31→        response.stats = {\n    32→          users: stats.users,\n    33→          listings: stats.listings,\n    34→          openListings: stats.open_listings,\n    35→        };\n    36→      }\n    37→    } catch {\n    38→      // Session check failed (e.g., no cookies context) — skip stats\n    39→    }\n    40→\n    41→    return NextResponse.json(response);\n    42→  } catch (error) {\n    43→    return NextResponse.json(\n    44→      {\n    45→        status: \"unhealthy\",\n    46→        uptime: Math.floor((Date.now() - startTime) / 1000),\n    47→        database: \"error\",\n    48→        error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : \"Unknown error\",\n    49→        timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    50→      },\n    51→      { status: 503 }\n    52→    );\n    53→  }\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"12480a4a-1af0-4707-81c5-14b484ee828f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:51.961Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01SK6mkcxno8yjP4FnKj8RQK","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import { isBotConfigured, getBotInfo } from \"@/lib/discord\";\n     3→import { safeCompare } from \"@/lib/crypto-utils\";\n     4→\n     5→/**\n     6→ * Discord bot setup endpoint.\n     7→ * Returns bot info and invite URL for verification.\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Protected by DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET env var.\n    10→ */\n    11→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    12→  const { secret } = await req.json();\n    13→  const setupSecret = process.env.DISCORD_SETUP_SECRET || \"\";\n    14→\n    15→  if (!setupSecret || !secret || typeof secret !== \"string\" || !safeCompare(secret, setupSecret)) {\n    16→    return NextResponse.json(\n    17→      { error: \"Invalid setup secret\" },\n    18→      { status: 403 }\n    19→    );\n    20→  }\n    21→\n    22→  if (!isBotConfigured()) {\n    23→    return NextResponse.json(\n    24→      {\n    25→        error:\n    26→          \"Discord bot is not configured. Set DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN and DISCORD_CLIENT_ID environment variables.\",\n    27→      },\n    28→      { status: 503 }\n    29→    );\n    30→  }\n    31→\n    32→  const botInfo = await getBotInfo();\n    33→  if (!botInfo) {\n    34→    return NextResponse.json(\n    35→      { error: \"Failed to connect to Discord API. Check your bot token.\" },\n    36→      { status: 500 }\n    37→    );\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  return NextResponse.json({\n    41→    ok: true,\n    42→    bot: {\n    43→      id: botInfo.id,\n    44→      username: botInfo.username,\n    45→    },\n    46→    message: `Discord bot \"${botInfo.username}\" is configured and ready.`,\n    47→  });\n    48→}\n    49→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"9520954f-8cb8-494e-b0f7-40584160c422","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:52.740Z"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FsoV4vb6766zBs7dFQps9G","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import nodemailer from \"nodemailer\";\n     2→\n     3→/**\n     4→ * Check SMTP config live from process.env on each call — not at module load time.\n     5→ * Module-level constants would be frozen when the file is first imported,\n     6→ * permanently returning false if SMTP vars aren't set at that exact moment.\n     7→ */\n     8→function checkConfigured(): boolean {\n     9→  return (\n    10→    !!process.env.SMTP_HOST &&\n    11→    !!process.env.SMTP_PORT &&\n    12→    !!process.env.SMTP_FROM\n    13→  );\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→let transporter: nodemailer.Transporter | null = null;\n    17→let transporterConfigHash = \"\";\n    18→\n    19→/** Hash current SMTP env vars to detect config changes */\n    20→function smtpConfigHash(): string {\n    21→  return [\n    22→    process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    23→    process.env.SMTP_PORT,\n    24→    process.env.SMTP_SECURE,\n    25→    process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    26→    process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    27→    process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    28→  ].join(\"|\");\n    29→}\n    30→\n    31→function getTransporter(): nodemailer.Transporter | null {\n    32→  if (!checkConfigured()) return null;\n    33→  const currentHash = smtpConfigHash();\n    34→  if (!transporter || currentHash !== transporterConfigHash) {\n    35→    transporter = nodemailer.createTransport({\n    36→      host: process.env.SMTP_HOST,\n    37→      port: parseInt(process.env.SMTP_PORT || \"587\", 10),\n    38→      secure: process.env.SMTP_SECURE === \"true\",\n    39→      ...(process.env.SMTP_USER && process.env.SMTP_PASS\n    40→        ? {\n    41→            auth: {\n    42→              user: process.env.SMTP_USER,\n    43→              pass: process.env.SMTP_PASS,\n    44→            },\n    45→          }\n    46→        : {}),\n    47→    });\n    48→    transporterConfigHash = currentHash;\n    49→  }\n    50→  return transporter;\n    51→}\n    52→\n    53→export async function sendEmail(\n    54→  to: string,\n    55→  subject: string,\n    56→  text: string,\n    57→  html?: string\n    58→): Promise<boolean> {\n    59→  const t = getTransporter();\n    60→  if (!t) return false;\n    61→\n    62→  try {\n    63→    await t.sendMail({\n    64→      from: process.env.SMTP_FROM,\n    65→      to,\n    66→      subject,\n    67→      text,\n    68→      html: html || text,\n    69→    });\n    70→    return true;\n    71→  } catch (err) {\n    72→    console.error(\"Failed to send email:\", err);\n    73→    return false;\n    74→  }\n    75→}\n    76→\n    77→export function isEmailConfigured(): boolean {\n    78→  return checkConfigured();\n    79→}\n    80→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"67720f0f-14e6-4b55-8edd-9cea1d6a1558","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:02:56.223Z"}

\"next/link\";\n     4→import { useEffect, useState, useRef } from \"react\";\n     5→import { useRouter, usePathname } from \"next/navigation\";\n     6→\n     7→interface User {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  email: string;\n    10→  displayName: string;\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→export default function Navbar() {\n    14→  const [user, setUser] = useState<User | null>(null);\n    15→  const [notifCount, setNotifCount] = useState(0);\n    16→  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    17→  const [mobileMenuOpen, setMobileMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n    18→  const router = useRouter();\n    19→  const pathname = usePathname();\n    20→  const menuRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n    21→\n    22→  useEffect(() => {\n    23→    fetch(\"/api/auth/me\")\n    24→      .then((r) => r.json())\n    25→      .then((data) => {\n    26→        if (data.user) {\n    27→          setUser(data.user);\n    28→          setNotifCount(data.user.unreadNotificationCount || 0);\n    29→        }\n    30→      })\n    31→      .catch(() => {\n    32→        // Auth check failed — stay logged out\n    33→      });\n    34→  }, [pathname]);\n    35→\n    36→  // Close menus on outside click\n    37→  useEffect(() => {\n    38→    const handleClickOutside = (e: MouseEvent) => {\n    39→      if (menuRef.current && !menuRef.current.contains(e.target as Node)) {\n    40→        setMenuOpen(false);\n    41→      }\n    42→    };\n    43→    document.addEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    44→    return () => document.removeEventListener(\"mousedown\", handleClickOutside);\n    45→  }, []);\n    46→\n    47→  // Close mobile menu on route change\n    48→  useEffect(() => {\n    49→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    50→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    51→  }, [pathname]);\n    52→\n    53→  const handleLogout = async () => {\n    54→    await fetch(\"/api/auth/logout\", { method: \"POST\" });\n    55→    setUser(null);\n    56→    setMenuOpen(false);\n    57→    setMobileMenuOpen(false);\n    58→    router.push(\"/\");\n    59→    router.refresh();\n    60→  };\n    61→\n    62→  return (\n    63→    <nav\n    64→      className=\"border-b sticky top-0 z-50\"\n    65→      style={{\n    66→        borderColor: \"var(--color-border)\",\n    67→        backgroundColor: \"var(--color-bg)\",\n    68→      }}\n    69→    >\n    70→      <div className=\"max-w-5xl mx-auto px-3 sm:px-4 h-14 sm:h-16 flex items-center justify-between\">\n    71→        <Link\n    72→ setMobileMenuOpen(false)}\n    76→        >\n    77→          bookmate\n    78→        </Link>\n    79→\n    80→        {/* Desktop nav */}\n    81→        <div className=\"hidden sm:flex items-center gap-4\">\n    82→          {user ? (\n    83→            <>\n    84→              <Link\n    85→                href=\"/listings/create\"\n    86→                className=\"btn-primary text-sm\"\n    87→                style={{ {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01V3jcG9418aAnGS84UN2akw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState } from \"react\";\n     4→import Link from \"next/link\";\n     5→\n     6→interface Notification {\n     7→  id: number;\n     8→  listing_id: number;\n     9→  type: string;\n    10→  message: string;\n    11→  is_read: number;\n    12→  created_at: string;\n    13→  book_title: string;\n    14→}\n    15→\n    16→export default function NotificationsPage() {\n    17→  const [notifications, setNotifications] = useState<Notification[]>([]);\n    18→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n    19→  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);\n    20→\n    21→  useEffect(() => {\n    22→    fetch(\"/api/notifications\")\n    23→      .then((r) => {\n    24→        if (!r.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to load notifications\");\n    25→        return r.json();\n    26→      })\n    27→      .then((data) => {\n    28→        setNotifications(data.notifications || []);\n    29→        // Mark all as read (fire-and-forget with silent catch)\n    30→        fetch(\"/api/notifications\", {\n    31→          method: \"PATCH\",\n    32→          headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    33→          body: JSON.stringify({}),\n    34→        }).catch(() => {});\n    35→      })\n    36→      .catch(() => {\n    37→        setError(\"Could not load notifications. Please try again.\");\n    38→      })\n    39→      .finally(() => {\n    40→        setLoading(false);\n    41→      });\n    42→  }, []);\n    43→\n    44→  if (loading) {\n    45→    return (\n    46→      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n    47→        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n    48→      </div>\n    49→    );\n    50→  }\n    51→\n    52→  if (error) {\n    53→    return (\n    54→      <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    55→        <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    56→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">\n    57→          <p\n    58→            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n    59→            style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n    60→            role=\"alert\"\n    61→          >\n    62→            {error}\n    63→          </p>\n    64→          <button\n    65→            onClick={() => window.location.reload()}\n    66→            className=\"btn-primary\"\n    67→          >\n    68→            Try again\n    69→          </button>\n    70→        </div>\n    71→      </div>\n    72→    );\n    73→  }\n    74→\n    75→  return (\n    76→    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n    77→      <h1 className=\"text-2xl sm:text-3xl mb-4 sm:mb-6\">Notifications</h1>\n    78→\n    79→      {notifications.length === 0 ? (\n    80→        <div className=\"text-center py-12\">"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"toolu_019SFUdQnQX2zV8uSvA6GPeX","session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"bd848b3c-156f-4af4-889c-9b20e9c937f4","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:03:01.399Z"}
