{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01DtG8mPF1EZ6fadRKzm3Dgw","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function POST(\n     6→  req: NextRequest,\n     7→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n     8→) {\n     9→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    10→  if (!session) {\n    11→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    12→  }\n    13→\n    14→  const { id } = await params;\n    15→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n    16→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    17→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n    18→  }\n    19→\n    20→  const listing = db\n    21→    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    22→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n    23→\n    24→  if (!listing) {\n    25→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n    26→  }\n    27→\n    28→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    29→    return NextResponse.json(\n    30→      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n    31→      { status: 403 }\n    32→    );\n    33→  }\n    34→\n    35→  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    36→    return NextResponse.json(\n    37→      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n    38→      { status: 400 }\n    39→    );\n    40→  }\n    41→\n    42→  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n    43→\n    44→  if (\n    45→    !discordLink ||\n    46→    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    47→    !(\n    48→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n    49→      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    50→    )\n    51→  ) {\n    52→    return NextResponse.json(\n    53→      {\n    54→        error:\n    55→          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n    56→      },\n    57→      { status: 400 }\n    58→    );\n    59→  }\n    60→\n    61→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    62→    discordLink.trim(),\n    63→    listingId\n    64→  );\n    65→\n    66→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    67→}\n    68→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"c340cbbf-365c-44df-bf6e-e625a7b77273","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:04:37.476Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/discord/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (\n    !discordLink ||\n    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    !(\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    )\n  ) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n      },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    discordLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":68,"startLine":1,"totalLines":68}}}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01XYfowLUiPKcFnrVoAZ6GwQ","type":"tool_result","content":"   125→    } finally {\n   126→      setDeleting(false);\n   127→    }\n   128→  };\n   129→\n   130→  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n   131→    if (!id) return;\n   132→    try {\n   133→      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n   134→      const data = await res.json();\n   135→      if (data.givenRatings) {\n   136→        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n   137→        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n   138→        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n   139→        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n   140→          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n   141→          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n   142→          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n   143→        }\n   144→        setGivenRatings(given);\n   145→        setRatingScores(scores);\n   146→        setRatingComments(comments);\n   147→      }\n   148→    } catch {\n   149→      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n   150→    }\n   151→  }, [id]);\n   152→\n   153→  useEffect(() => {\n   154→    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n   155→      fetchRatings();\n   156→    }\n   157→  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n   158→\n   159→  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n   160→    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n   161→    if (!score) return;\n   162→    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n   163→    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n   164→    try {"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"b0f2f6b3-6433-4875-ad5a-5673be487dca","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:04:37.473Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx","content":"    } finally {\n      setDeleting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (!id) return;\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (data.givenRatings) {\n        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n        }\n        setGivenRatings(given);\n        setRatingScores(scores);\n        setRatingComments(comments);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n\n  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n    if (!score) return;\n    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n    try {","numLines":40,"startLine":125,"totalLines":1467}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_0111vPHwfUtQLSUTN9Ae3e63","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"64fc9baa-1c79-49ca-bd36-792639a3238f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:04:46.766Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","oldString":"  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);","newString":"  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.id, l.author_id, l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.book_olid,\n        l.preferred_language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,\n        l.max_group_size, l.is_full, l.requires_approval, l.platform_preference,\n        l.created_at,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n\n/** Escape LIKE metacharacters so user input is matched literally */\nfunction escapeLike(value: string): string {\n  return value.replace(/[%_\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n}\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n\n  if (!includePast) {\n    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(effectiveDate);\n  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(startDateFrom);\n  }\n\n  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' OR l.book_author LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\')\");\n    params.push(`%${escapeLike(q)}%`, `%${escapeLike(q)}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    params.push(meetingFormat);\n  }\n\n  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\'\");\n    params.push(`%${escapeLike(readingPace)}%`);\n  }\n\n  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n\n  const ORDER_MAP: Record<string, string> = {\n    newest: \"l.created_at DESC\",\n    oldest: \"l.created_at ASC\",\n    start_date: \"l.start_date ASC\",\n  };\n  const orderClause = ORDER_MAP[sort] ?? \"l.created_at DESC\";\n\n  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n\n  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n  const countResult = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    )\n    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n\n  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.*,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listings,\n    pagination: {\n      page,\n      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n      total: countResult.total,\n      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":74,"oldLines":7,"newStart":74,"newLines":10,"lines":["   const listings = db","     .prepare(","       `SELECT","-        l.*,","+        l.id, l.author_id, l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.book_olid,","+        l.preferred_language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,","+        l.max_group_size, l.is_full, l.requires_approval, l.platform_preference,","+        l.created_at,","         u.display_name as author_name,","         (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count","       FROM listings l"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DSf5gkPTfvmtCpxe8M2UJS","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01FLW6RqFNWpm3EWC1webTjN","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","old_string":"  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }","new_string":"  } else {\n    // Reject — use WHERE status='pending' to prevent overwriting a concurrent approval\n    const updated = db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    if (updated.changes === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Application already decided\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    try {\n      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (rejection succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2051,"cache_read_input_tokens":40357,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2051},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"e58ab086-b706-440e-9d7e-932e7b005fcf"}

{"type":"stream_event","event":{"type":"content_block_delta","index":3,"delta":{"type":"input_json_delta","partial_json":"{\"fi"}},"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","parent_tool_use_id":null,"uuid":"b68128e8-f26c-4081-a460-e8fa4ee83e3a"}
{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01FLW6RqFNWpm3EWC1webTjN","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"1c644c53-294d-4451-a2a3-40e1e3a071eb","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:04:51.191Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts","oldString":"  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }","newString":"  } else {\n    // Reject — use WHERE status='pending' to prevent overwriting a concurrent approval\n    const updated = db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    if (updated.changes === 0) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Application already decided\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    try {\n      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (rejection succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Only the organizer can manage applications\" }, { status: 403 });\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { applicationId, action } = body;\n\n  if (!applicationId || typeof applicationId !== \"number\" || !Number.isInteger(applicationId) || applicationId < 1 || ![\"approve\", \"reject\"].includes(action)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\n  const application = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n    )\n    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!application) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Application not found or already decided\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\n\n  if (action === \"approve\") {\n    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\n    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n      // Re-read max_group_size inside transaction to avoid stale data from concurrent PATCH\n      const freshListing = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT max_group_size FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { max_group_size: number } | undefined;\n\n      if (!freshListing) {\n        throw new Error(\"Listing not found\");\n      }\n\n      // Check if group is already full\n      const { count } = db\n        .prepare(\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\")\n        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\n\n      if (count >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        throw new Error(\"Group is already full\");\n      }\n\n      // Update application status\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(applicationId);\n\n      // Add to members\n      db.prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\n\n      // Check if group is now full\n      const newCount = count + 1;\n      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\n      if (newCount >= freshListing.max_group_size) {\n        db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\").run(listingId);\n\n        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\n        rejectedApps = db\n          .prepare(\n            \"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"\n          )\n          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\n\n        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\n          db.prepare(\n            \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n          ).run(app.id);\n        }\n\n        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\n      }\n      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\n    });\n\n    try {\n      const result = approveTransaction();\n\n      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\n      try {\n        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"approved\");\n\n        if (result.isFull) {\n          notifyGroupFull(\n            listingId,\n            listing.book_title as string,\n            listing.platform_preference as string\n          );\n          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\n            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \"rejected\");\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (notifErr) {\n        console.error(\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\", notifErr);\n      }\n\n      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    } catch (err) {\n      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \"Failed to approve\";\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\n    }\n  } else {\n    // Reject\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(applicationId);\n\n    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":138,"oldLines":13,"newStart":138,"newLines":24,"lines":["       return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });","     }","   } else {","-    // Reject","-    db.prepare(","-      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"","+    // Reject — use WHERE status='pending' to prevent overwriting a concurrent approval","+    const updated = db.prepare(","+      \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ? AND status = 'pending'\"","     ).run(applicationId);"," ","-    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");","+    if (updated.changes === 0) {","+      return NextResponse.json(","+        { error: \"Application already decided\" },","+        { status: 409 }","+      );","+    }"," ","+    try {","+      notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \"rejected\");","+    } catch (notifErr) {","+      console.error(\"Notification error (rejection succeeded):\", notifErr);","+    }","+","     return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });","   }"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

   if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }","newString":"    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (typeof email !== \"string\" || typeof password !== \"string\" || typeof displayName !== \"string\") {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name must be strings\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport bcrypt from \"bcryptjs\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { getSession } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { checkRateLimit } from \"@/lib/rate-limit\";\n\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    const { email, password, displayName } = await req.json();\n\n    if (!email || !password || !displayName) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email, password, and display name are required\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes\n    const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";\n    const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);\n    if (!allowed) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Too many registration attempts. Please try again later.\" },\n        { status: 429, headers: { \"Retry-After\": String(retryAfter) } }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (password.length < 8) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at least 8 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // bcrypt only uses the first 72 bytes; cap to prevent DoS via slow hashing\n    if (password.length > 72) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Password must be at most 72 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (displayName.length > 100) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (email.length > 254) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Email address is too long\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    if (!/^[^\\s@]+@[^\\s@]+\\.[^\\s@]+$/.test(email.trim())) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Please provide a valid email address\" },\n        { status: 400 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    // Normalize email before duplicate check (INSERT stores lowercase)\n    const normalizedEmail = email.toLowerCase().trim();\n\n    // Check if email is already taken\n    const existing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?\")\n      .get(normalizedEmail);\n    if (existing) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"An account with this email already exists\" },\n        { status: 409 }\n      );\n    }\n\n    const passwordHash = await bcrypt.hash(password, 12);\n\n    const result = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\"\n      )\n      .run(normalizedEmail, passwordHash, displayName.trim());\n\n    // Auto-login after registration\n    const session = await getSession();\n    session.userId = Number(result.lastInsertRowid);\n    session.email = normalizedEmail;\n    session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    await session.save();\n\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        user: {\n          id: result.lastInsertRowid,\n          email: normalizedEmail,\n          displayName: displayName.trim(),\n        },\n      },\n      { status: 201 }\n    );\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Registration error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Internal server error\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    );\n  }\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":15,"oldLines":6,"newStart":15,"newLines":13,"lines":["       );","     }"," ","+    if (typeof email !== \"string\" || typeof password !== \"string\" || typeof displayName !== \"string\") {","+      return NextResponse.json(","+        { error: \"Email, password, and display name must be strings\" },","+        { status: 400 }","+      );","+    }","+","     // Rate limit: 3 registrations per IP per 15 minutes","     const ip = req.headers.get(\"x-forwarded-for\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() || \"unknown\";","     const { allowed, retryAfter } = checkRateLimit(`register:${ip}`, 3);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01DSf5gkPTfvmtCpxe8M2UJS","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01Vw7RxBjYkNwgpyVtyRtmGs","name":"Edit","input":{"replace_all":false,"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","old_string":"  const result = applyTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}","new_string":"  try {\n    const result = applyTransaction();\n\n    if (result.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n    }\n\n    // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n    try {\n      notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (application succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Apply error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2051,"cache_read_input_tokens":40357,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2051},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"692b8064-f018-4ef7-973f-2a53d694ce0e"}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Vw7RxBjYkNwgpyVtyRtmGs","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"92dd44d6-1314-4ff6-8a4d-ff8f6f773370","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:04:57.469Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/apply/route.ts","oldString":"  const result = applyTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}","newString":"  try {\n    const result = applyTransaction();\n\n    if (result.error) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n    }\n\n    // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n    try {\n      notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n    } catch (notifErr) {\n      console.error(\"Notification error (application succeeded):\", notifErr);\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Apply error:\", error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { notifyApplicationReceived } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  _req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot apply to your own listing\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.requires_approval) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"This group does not require approval. Join directly.\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"This group is already full\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  // Wrap membership check + application in a transaction to prevent TOCTOU races\n  const applyTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\n    // Check if already a member\n    const isMember = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    if (isMember) {\n      return { error: \"You are already a member\", status: 400 };\n    }\n\n    // Re-check is_full inside transaction\n    const currentListing = db\n      .prepare(\"SELECT is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n      .get(listingId) as { is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n    if (currentListing?.is_full) {\n      return { error: \"This group is already full\", status: 400 };\n    }\n\n    // Check if already applied (pending)\n    const existingApp = db\n      .prepare(\n        \"SELECT id, status FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n      )\n      .get(listingId, session.userId) as { id: number; status: string } | undefined;\n\n    if (existingApp) {\n      if (existingApp.status === \"pending\") {\n        return { error: \"You have already applied\", status: 400 };\n      }\n      if (existingApp.status === \"approved\") {\n        return { error: \"You are already approved\", status: 400 };\n      }\n      // If rejected, allow re-application by updating status back to pending\n      db.prepare(\n        \"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'pending', decided_at = NULL, applied_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n      ).run(existingApp.id);\n\n      return { error: null, status: 200 };\n    }\n\n    // Insert new application\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId);\n\n    return { error: null, status: 200 };\n  });\n\n  const result = applyTransaction();\n\n  if (result.error) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });\n  }\n\n  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)\n  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":94,"oldLines":14,"newStart":94,"newLines":23,"lines":["     return { error: null, status: 200 };","   });"," ","-  const result = applyTransaction();","+  try {","+    const result = applyTransaction();"," ","-  if (result.error) {","-    return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });","-  }","+    if (result.error) {","+      return NextResponse.json({ error: result.error }, { status: result.status });","+    }"," ","-  // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)","-  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");","+    // Notify outside transaction (fire-and-forget)","+    try {","+      notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \"Someone\");","+    } catch (notifErr) {","+      console.error(\"Notification error (application succeeded):\", notifErr);","+    }"," ","-  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });","+    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });","+  } catch (error) {","+    console.error(\"Apply error:\", error);","+    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Internal server error\" }, { status: 500 });","+  }"," }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

 if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {","newString":"  if (!telegramLink || typeof telegramLink !== \"string\" || !/^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/-]{1,490}$/.test(telegramLink)) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Telegram link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { telegramLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    telegramLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":41,"oldLines":7,"newStart":41,"newLines":7,"lines":[" ","   const { telegramLink } = await req.json();"," ","-  if (!telegramLink || !telegramLink.startsWith(\"https://t.me/\") || telegramLink.length > 512) {","+  if (!telegramLink || typeof telegramLink !== \"string\" || !/^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/-]{1,490}$/.test(telegramLink)) {","     return NextResponse.json(","       { error: \"Please provide a valid Telegram invite link (https://t.me/..., max 512 characters)\" },","       { status: 400 }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

/^https:\\/\\/discord\\.com\\/invite\\/[\\w-]{1,470}$/.test(discordLink)\n    )\n  ) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\n) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { id } = await params;\n  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Invalid listing ID\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Listing not found\" }, { status: 404 });\n  }\n\n  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Only the listing author can set the Discord link\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Group must be full before sharing a platform link\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const { discordLink } = await req.json();\n\n  if (\n    !discordLink ||\n    discordLink.length > 512 ||\n    !(\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||\n      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")\n    )\n  ) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      {\n        error:\n          \"Please provide a valid Discord invite link (https://discord.gg/... or https://discord.com/invite/..., max 512 characters)\",\n      },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET discord_link = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    discordLink.trim(),\n    listingId\n  );\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":43,"oldLines":10,"newStart":43,"newLines":10,"lines":[" ","   if (","     !discordLink ||","-    discordLink.length > 512 ||","+    typeof discordLink !== \"string\" ||","     !(","-      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.gg/\") ||","-      discordLink.startsWith(\"https://discord.com/invite/\")","+      /^https:\\/\\/discord\\.gg\\/[\\w-]{1,480}$/.test(discordLink) ||","+      /^https:\\/\\/discord\\.com\\/invite\\/[\\w-]{1,470}$/.test(discordLink)","     )","   ) {","     return NextResponse.json("]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01Ns1a3gSH5auNtUNPT1UgXz","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"aec9f2d1-adae-4991-9cb6-3ec5d23cf423","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:05:01.933Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reputation/route.ts","oldString":"  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {","newString":"  if (userIdParam && (isNaN(userId as number) || userId < 1)) {","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\n/**\n * GET /api/profile/reputation?userId=X\n *\n * Returns a user's reputation score and rating breakdown.\n * If no userId is provided, returns the current user's reputation.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const userIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"userId\");\n  const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;\n  const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;\n\n  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Average score\n  const stats = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        COUNT(*) as total_ratings,\n        ROUND(AVG(score), 1) as average_score,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as five_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as four_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as three_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as two_star,\n        SUM(CASE WHEN score = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as one_star\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as {\n      total_ratings: number;\n      average_score: number | null;\n      five_star: number;\n      four_star: number;\n      three_star: number;\n      two_star: number;\n      one_star: number;\n    };\n\n  // Number of completed groups\n  const completedGroups = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as count\n       FROM listing_members lm\n       JOIN listings l ON lm.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE lm.user_id = ? AND l.is_full = 1`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Number of groups where this user has given ratings\n  const groupsRated = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT listing_id) as count\n       FROM ratings\n       WHERE rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .get(userId) as { count: number };\n\n  // Recent ratings received (with anonymized feedback)\n  const recentRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.score, r.comment, r.created_at, l.book_title\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN listings l ON r.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE r.rated_user_id = ?\n       ORDER BY r.created_at DESC\n       LIMIT 10`\n    )\n    .all(userId) as {\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      created_at: string;\n      book_title: string;\n    }[];\n\n  // Strip comments from ratings when viewing other users' profiles (privacy)\n  const sanitizedRatings = isOwnProfile\n    ? recentRatings\n    : recentRatings.map(({ score, created_at, book_title }) => ({\n        score,\n        created_at,\n        book_title,\n      }));\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    reputation: {\n      averageScore: stats.average_score || 0,\n      totalRatings: stats.total_ratings,\n      completedGroups: completedGroups.count,\n      groupsRated: groupsRated.count,\n      breakdown: {\n        5: stats.five_star || 0,\n        4: stats.four_star || 0,\n        3: stats.three_star || 0,\n        2: stats.two_star || 0,\n        1: stats.one_star || 0,\n      },\n      recentRatings: sanitizedRatings,\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":21,"oldLines":7,"newStart":21,"newLines":7,"lines":["   const userId = userIdParam ? parseInt(userIdParam, 10) : session.userId;","   const isOwnProfile = userId === session.userId;"," ","-  if (userIdParam && isNaN(userId as number)) {","+  if (userIdParam && (isNaN(userId as number) || userId < 1)) {","     return NextResponse.json(","       { error: \"Invalid userId parameter\" },","       { status: 400 }"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012Ee6nWiNXvez8t1iBAkiTE","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→\"use client\";\n     2→\n     3→import { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\n     4→import { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\n     5→import BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n     6→\n     7→interface Member {\n     8→  id: number;\n     9→  display_name: string;\n    10→  bio: string;\n    11→  joined_at: string;\n    12→}\n    13→\n    14→interface Applicant {\n    15→  application_id: number;\n    16→  id: number;\n    17→  display_name: string;\n    18→  bio: string;\n    19→  applied_at: string;\n    20→}\n    21→\n    22→interface Listing {\n    23→  id: number;\n    24→  author_id: number;\n    25→  book_title: string;\n    26→  book_author: string;\n    27→  book_cover_url: string;\n    28→  language: string;\n    29→  reading_pace: string;\n    30→  start_date: string;"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"6e4d0c7f-e80f-4cd1-8494-04217d8ae69f","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:05:09.329Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/listings/[id]/ListingDetail.tsx","content":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;","numLines":30,"startLine":1,"totalLines":1467}}}
