 useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);","newString":"  useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember && !ratingsFetchedRef.current) {\n      ratingsFetchedRef.current = true;\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);","originalFile":"\"use client\";\n\nimport { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { useParams, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport BookCover from \"@/components/BookCover\";\n\ninterface Member {\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  joined_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Applicant {\n  application_id: number;\n  id: number;\n  display_name: string;\n  bio: string;\n  applied_at: string;\n}\n\ninterface Listing {\n  id: number;\n  author_id: number;\n  book_title: string;\n  book_author: string;\n  book_cover_url: string;\n  language: string;\n  reading_pace: string;\n  start_date: string;\n  meeting_format: string;\n  max_group_size: number;\n  telegram_link: string;\n  is_full: number;\n  requires_approval: number;\n  created_at: string;\n  author_name: string;\n  members: Member[];\n  memberCount: number;\n  isMember: boolean;\n  isAuthor: boolean;\n  hasApplied: boolean;\n  applicationStatus: string;\n  pendingApplicants: Applicant[];\n  currentUserId: number | null;\n  telegramBotConfigured: boolean;\n  discordBotConfigured: boolean;\n  platform_preference: string;\n  discord_link: string;\n}\n\nexport default function ListingDetail() {\n  const { id } = useParams();\n  const router = useRouter();\n  const [listing, setListing] = useState<Listing | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n  const [joining, setJoining] = useState(false);\n  const [applying, setApplying] = useState(false);\n  const [decidingId, setDecidingId] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [telegramLink, setTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [telegramSaving, setTelegramSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLoading, setAutoTelegramLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoTelegramLink, setAutoTelegramLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showManualFallback, setShowManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  // Discord state\n  const [discordLink, setDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [discordSaving, setDiscordSaving] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLoading, setAutoDiscordLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [autoDiscordLink, setAutoDiscordLink] = useState(\"\");\n  const [showDiscordManualFallback, setShowDiscordManualFallback] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\");\n\n  // Rating state\n  const [givenRatings, setGivenRatings] = useState<Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }>>({});\n  const [ratingScores, setRatingScores] = useState<Record<number, number>>({});\n  const [ratingComments, setRatingComments] = useState<Record<number, string>>({});\n  const [ratingSaving, setRatingSaving] = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [ratingMessage, setRatingMessage] = useState(\"\");\n  const ratingsFetchedRef = useRef(false);\n\n  const [notAvailable, setNotAvailable] = useState(false);\n\n  const [fetchError, setFetchError] = useState(false);\n  const [showDeleteConfirm, setShowDeleteConfirm] = useState(false);\n  const [deleting, setDeleting] = useState(false);\n\n  const fetchListing = useCallback(async () => {\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok && data.listing) {\n        setListing(data.listing);\n        setTelegramLink(data.listing.telegram_link || \"\");\n        setDiscordLink(data.listing.discord_link || \"\");\n      } else if (res.status === 404) {\n        setNotAvailable(true);\n      } else {\n        setFetchError(true);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setFetchError(true);\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    fetchListing();\n  }, [fetchListing]);\n\n  const handleDelete = async () => {\n    setDeleting(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}`, { method: \"DELETE\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (res.ok) {\n        router.push(\"/\");\n      } else {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to delete listing\");\n        setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Something went wrong. Please try again.\");\n      setShowDeleteConfirm(false);\n    } finally {\n      setDeleting(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const fetchRatings = useCallback(async () => {\n    if (!id) return;\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/ratings?listingId=${id}`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (data.givenRatings) {\n        const given: Record<number, { score: number; comment: string }> = {};\n        const scores: Record<number, number> = {};\n        const comments: Record<number, string> = {};\n        for (const r of data.givenRatings) {\n          given[r.rated_user_id] = { score: r.score, comment: r.comment };\n          scores[r.rated_user_id] = r.score;\n          comments[r.rated_user_id] = r.comment;\n        }\n        setGivenRatings(given);\n        setRatingScores(scores);\n        setRatingComments(comments);\n      }\n    } catch {\n      // Silently fail — ratings are not critical\n    }\n  }, [id]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {\n      fetchRatings();\n    }\n  }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);\n\n  const handleRatingSubmit = async (memberId: number) => {\n    const score = ratingScores[memberId];\n    if (!score) return;\n    setRatingSaving(memberId);\n    setRatingMessage(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/ratings\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({\n          listingId: parseInt(id as string, 10),\n          ratedUserId: memberId,\n          score,\n          comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\",\n        }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setRatingMessage(data.error || \"Failed to submit rating\");\n      } else {\n        setRatingMessage(\"Rating saved!\");\n        setGivenRatings((prev) => ({\n          ...prev,\n          [memberId]: { score, comment: ratingComments[memberId] || \"\" },\n        }));\n      }\n    } catch {\n      setRatingMessage(\"Failed to submit rating\");\n    } finally {\n      setRatingSaving(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleJoin = async () => {\n    setJoining(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/join`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to join. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setJoining(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleApply = async () => {\n    setApplying(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/apply`, { method: \"POST\" });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        if (res.status === 401) {\n          router.push(\"/auth/login\");\n          return;\n        }\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to apply. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setApplying(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDecision = async (applicationId: number, action: \"approve\" | \"reject\") => {\n    setDecidingId(applicationId);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/applications`, {\n        method: \"PATCH\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ applicationId, action }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to process application. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDecidingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidTelegramLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/t\\.me\\/[\\w+/]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const telegramLinkError = telegramLink && !isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://t.me/ (e.g., https://t.me/+AbCdEfGhIjK)\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleTelegramSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidTelegramLink(telegramLink)) return;\n    setTelegramSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/telegram`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ telegramLink: telegramLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setTelegramSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoTelegram = async () => {\n    setAutoTelegramLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-telegram`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Telegram link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoTelegramLink(data.deepLink);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoTelegramLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const isValidDiscordLink = (link: string) => {\n    return /^https:\\/\\/(discord\\.gg|discord\\.com\\/invite)\\/[\\w-]+$/.test(link.trim());\n  };\n\n  const discordLinkError = discordLink && !isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)\n    ? \"Link must start with https://discord.gg/ or https://discord.com/invite/\"\n    : \"\";\n\n  const handleDiscordSave = async () => {\n    if (!isValidDiscordLink(discordLink)) return;\n    setDiscordSaving(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/discord`, {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ discordLink: discordLink.trim() }),\n      });\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error);\n        return;\n      }\n      await fetchListing();\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to save link. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setDiscordSaving(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleAutoDiscord = async () => {\n    setAutoDiscordLoading(true);\n    setError(\"\");\n    try {\n      const res = await fetch(`/api/listings/${id}/auto-discord`);\n      const data = await res.json();\n      if (!res.ok) {\n        setError(data.error || \"Failed to generate Discord link\");\n        return;\n      }\n      setAutoDiscordLink(data.inviteUrl);\n    } catch {\n      setError(\"Failed to connect. Please try again.\");\n    } finally {\n      setAutoDiscordLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const formatMeetingType = (f: string) => {\n    const labels: Record<string, string> = {\n      voice: \"Voice calls\",\n      text: \"Text chat\",\n      mixed: \"Mixed (voice + text)\",\n    };\n    return labels[f] || f;\n  };\n\n  if (loading) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n        <p style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>Loading...</p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (fetchError) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Something went wrong</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          Failed to load this listing. Please try again.\n        </p>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => { setFetchError(false); setLoading(true); fetchListing(); }}\n          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded cursor-pointer\"\n          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n        >\n          Retry\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (notAvailable) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">This listing is no longer available</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group has reached its maximum size and is no longer visible to non-members.\n        </p>\n        <button\n          onClick={() => router.push(\"/\")}\n          className=\"mt-4 px-4 py-2 rounded\"\n          style={{ background: \"var(--color-accent)\", color: \"white\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n        >\n          Browse other listings\n        </button>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return (\n      <div className=\"text-center py-16\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl mb-2\">Listing not found</h2>\n        <p style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n          This reading group may have been removed.\n        </p>\n      </div>\n    );\n  }\n\n  const spotsLeft = listing.max_group_size - listing.memberCount;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"max-w-2xl mx-auto\">\n      {error && (\n        <div\n          className=\"mb-4 p-3 rounded-lg text-sm\"\n          style={{\n            backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n            color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n          }}\n        >\n          {error}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n        <div className=\"flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 sm:gap-5\">\n          <BookCover\n            src={listing.book_cover_url}\n            alt={listing.book_title}\n            width={96}\n            height={144}\n            className=\"w-20 h-28 sm:w-24 sm:h-36 object-cover rounded-lg shadow-sm\"\n            style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}\n          />\n\n          <div className=\"flex-1\">\n            <h1 className=\"text-xl sm:text-2xl mb-1\">{listing.book_title}</h1>\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n              style={{\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              by {listing.book_author}\n            </p>\n\n            <div className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mb-3\">\n              {new Date(listing.start_date + \"T00:00:00\") < new Date(new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0] + \"T00:00:00\") && (\n                <span\n                  className=\"badge\"\n                  style={{\n                    backgroundColor: \"rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.1)\",\n                    color: \"#6b7280\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Past start date\n                </span>\n              )}\n              {listing.requires_approval ? (\n                <span\n                  className=\"badge\"\n                  style={{\n                    backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                    color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                    fontSize: \"0.7rem\",\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  }}\n                >\n                  Approval required\n                </span>\n              ) : null}\n            </div>\n\n            <div\n              className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-y-2 gap-x-4 sm:gap-x-6 text-sm\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Pace\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.reading_pace}</div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Starts\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {new Date(listing.start_date + \"T00:00:00\").toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n                    month: \"long\",\n                    day: \"numeric\",\n                    year: \"numeric\",\n                  })}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Format\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">\n                  {formatMeetingType(listing.meeting_format)}\n                </div>\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <span style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                  Language\n                </span>\n                <div className=\"font-semibold\">{listing.language}</div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div\n          className=\"mt-4 sm:mt-5 pt-4 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3\"\n          style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n        >\n          <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n            <span className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n              {listing.memberCount}/{listing.max_group_size} readers\n            </span>\n            {spotsLeft > 0 && (\n              <span\n                className=\"text-sm ml-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                ({spotsLeft} {spotsLeft === 1 ? \"spot\" : \"spots\"} left)\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !listing.requires_approval && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleJoin}\n              disabled={joining}\n            >\n              {joining ? \"Joining...\" : \"Join this group\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && !listing.is_full && !!listing.requires_approval && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <button\n              className=\"btn-primary\"\n              onClick={handleApply}\n              disabled={applying}\n            >\n              {applying ? \"Applying...\" : \"Apply to join\"}\n            </button>\n          )}\n\n          {!listing.isMember && listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Application pending\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {listing.isMember && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              You&apos;re a member\n            </span>\n          )}\n\n          {!!listing.is_full && !listing.isMember && !listing.hasApplied && (\n            <span\n              className=\"badge\"\n              style={{\n                backgroundColor: \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              }}\n            >\n              Group is full\n            </span>\n          )}\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Author actions: Edit & Delete */}\n        {listing.isAuthor && !listing.telegram_link && !listing.discord_link && (\n          <div\n            className=\"mt-4 pt-4 flex gap-3\"\n            style={{ borderTop: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\" }}\n          >\n            <button\n              className=\"flex-1 py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n              style={{\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                display: \"inline-flex\",\n                alignItems: \"center\",\n                justifyContent: \"center\",\n                gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-accent)\",\n                color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n              }}\n              onClick={() => router.push(`/listings/${id}/edit`)}\n            >\n              <svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"2\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\">\n                <path d=\"M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7\"/>\n                <path d=\"M18.5 2.5a2.121 2.121 0 0 1 3 3L12 15l-4 1 1-4 9.5-9.5z\"/>\n              </svg>\n              Edit\n            </button>\n            {!showDeleteConfirm ? (\n              <button\n                className=\"py-2 px-4 rounded-lg text-sm font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n                style={{\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                  display: \"inline-flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  justifyContent: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.4rem\",\n                  border: \"1.5px solid var(--color-error)\",\n                  color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n                }}\n                onClick={() => setShowDeleteConfirm(true)}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" strokeWidth=\"2\" strokeLinecap=\"round\" strokeLinejoin=\"round\">\n                  <polyline points=\"3 6 5 6 21 6\"/>\n                  <path d=\"M19 6v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6m3 0V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Delete\n              </button>\n            ) : (\n              <div\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-2 p-2 rounded-lg\"\n                style={{\n                  backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.06)\",\n                  border: \"1px solid rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.15)\",\n                }}\n              >\n                <span\n                  className=\"text-xs\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Delete this group?\n                </span>\n                <button\n                  className=\"py-1 px-3 rounded text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    backgroundColor: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                    color: \"white\",\n                    border: \"none\",\n                  }}\n                  disabled={deleting}\n                  onClick={handleDelete}\n                >\n                  {deleting ? \"Deleting...\" : \"Confirm\"}\n                </button>\n                <button\n                  className=\"py-1 px-3 rounded text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer\"\n                  style={{\n                    fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                    border: \"1px solid var(--color-border)\",\n                    color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                    backgroundColor: \"transparent\",\n                  }}\n                  onClick={() => setShowDeleteConfirm(false)}\n                >\n                  Cancel\n                </button>\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </div>\n        )}\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Chat platform section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {!!listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference !== \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Telegram Group</h2>\n\n          {listing.telegram_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Telegram group to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.telegram_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{ display: \"inline-flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                </svg>\n                Join Telegram Group\n              </a>\n              {listing.isAuthor && (\n                <p\n                  className=\"text-xs mt-3\"\n                  style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                >\n                  Link shared: {listing.telegram_link}\n                </p>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Telegram group and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.telegramBotConfigured && !showManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoTelegramLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Create a Telegram group with one click — the bot will\n                        automatically generate an invite link for your readers.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoTelegram}\n                        disabled={autoTelegramLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        {autoTelegramLoading\n                          ? \"Generating...\"\n                          : \"Create Telegram Group Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Click the link below to create the group:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoTelegramLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M11.944 0A12 12 0 0 0 0 12a12 12 0 0 0 12 12 12 12 0 0 0 12-12A12 12 0 0 0 12 0a12 12 0 0 0-.056 0zm4.962 7.224c.1-.002.321.023.465.14a.506.506 0 0 1 .171.325c.016.093.036.306.02.472-.18 1.898-.962 6.502-1.36 8.627-.168.9-.499 1.201-.82 1.23-.696.065-1.225-.46-1.9-.902-1.056-.693-1.653-1.124-2.678-1.8-1.185-.78-.417-1.21.258-1.91.177-.184 3.247-2.977 3.307-3.23.007-.032.014-.15-.056-.212s-.174-.041-.249-.024c-.106.024-1.793 1.14-5.061 3.345-.479.33-.913.49-1.302.48-.428-.008-1.252-.241-1.865-.44-.752-.245-1.349-.374-1.297-.789.027-.216.325-.437.893-.663 3.498-1.524 5.83-2.529 6.998-3.014 3.332-1.386 4.025-1.627 4.476-1.635z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        Open Telegram & Create Group\n                      </a>\n                      <ol className=\"text-xs mt-3 space-y-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                        <li>Telegram will open and ask you to create a group</li>\n                        <li>Name it something like &quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</li>\n                        <li>The bot will automatically generate an invite link</li>\n                        <li>All members will be notified — no manual steps needed!</li>\n                      </ol>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        After creating the group, refresh this page to see the invite link.\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {/* Manual setup (shown as fallback or when bot is not configured) */}\n              {(!listing.telegramBotConfigured || showManualFallback) && (\n                <div>\n                  {showManualFallback && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mb-3\">\n                      <button\n                        className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                        style={{\n                          background: \"none\",\n                          border: \"none\",\n                          color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                          font: \"inherit\",\n                          padding: 0,\n                        }}\n                        onClick={() => setShowManualFallback(false)}\n                      >\n                        Back to automatic setup\n                      </button>\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n\n                  {/* Step-by-step instructions */}\n                  <div\n                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.15)\" }}\n                  >\n                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-accent)\" }}>\n                      How to create a Telegram group:\n                    </p>\n                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                      <li>Open Telegram and tap the pencil/compose icon</li>\n                      <li>Select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>New Group</strong></li>\n                      <li>Name it something like <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>&quot;{listing.book_title} Reading Group&quot;</strong></li>\n                      <li>You can skip adding members for now — add them via the invite link</li>\n                      <li>\n                        Open the group, tap the group name at the top, then{\" \"}\n                        <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite via Link</strong>\n                      </li>\n                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://t.me/+AbCdEfG...</code>)</li>\n                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                    </ol>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                      <input\n                        type=\"url\"\n                        className=\"input-field\"\n                        placeholder=\"https://t.me/+...\"\n                        value={telegramLink}\n                        onChange={(e) => setTelegramLink(e.target.value)}\n                        style={{\n                          borderColor: telegramLinkError\n                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                            : telegramLink && !telegramLinkError\n                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                              : undefined,\n                        }}\n                      />\n                      {telegramLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                          {telegramLinkError}\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                      {telegramLink && !telegramLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                          Valid Telegram link\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                    <button\n                      className=\"btn-primary\"\n                      onClick={handleTelegramSave}\n                      disabled={telegramSaving || !telegramLink || !!telegramLinkError}\n                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\" }}\n                    >\n                      {telegramSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Telegram group link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Telegram invite link once\n                they set up the group. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Discord channel section — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {!!listing.is_full && listing.isMember && listing.platform_preference === \"discord\" && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\" style={{ display: \"flex\", alignItems: \"center\", gap: \"0.5rem\" }}>\n            <svg width=\"20\" height=\"20\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n              <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 0-.1636-.3933-.4058-.8742-.6177-1.2495a.077.077 0 00-.0785-.037 19.7363 19.7363 0 00-4.8852 1.515.0699.0699 0 00-.0321.0277C.5334 9.0458-.319 13.5799.0992 18.0578a.0824.0824 0 00.0312.0561c2.0528 1.5076 4.0413 2.4228 5.9929 3.0294a.0777.0777 0 00.0842-.0276c.4616-.6304.8731-1.2952 1.226-1.9942a.076.076 0 00-.0416-.1057c-.6528-.2476-1.2743-.5495-1.8722-.8923a.077.077 0 01-.0076-.1277c.1258-.0943.2517-.1923.3718-.2914a.0743.0743 0 01.0776-.0105c3.9278 1.7933 8.18 1.7933 12.0614 0a.0739.0739 0 01.0785.0095c.1202.099.246.1981.3728.2924a.077.077 0 01-.0066.1276 12.2986 12.2986 0 01-1.873.8914.0766.0766 0 00-.0407.1067c.3604.698.7719 1.3628 1.225 1.9932a.076.076 0 00.0842.0286c1.961-.6067 3.9495-1.5219 6.0023-3.0294a.077.077 0 00.0313-.0552c.5004-5.177-.8382-9.6739-3.5485-13.6604a.061.061 0 00-.0312-.0286zM8.02 15.3312c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9555-2.4189 2.157-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.9555 2.4189-2.1569 2.4189zm7.9748 0c-1.1825 0-2.1569-1.0857-2.1569-2.419 0-1.3332.9554-2.4189 2.1569-2.4189 1.2108 0 2.1757 1.0952 2.1568 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n            </svg>\n            Discord Channel\n          </h2>\n\n          {listing.discord_link ? (\n            <div>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n                style={{\n                  color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                  fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                }}\n              >\n                The reading group is full! Join the Discord server to start\n                coordinating:\n              </p>\n              <a\n                href={listing.discord_link}\n                target=\"_blank\"\n                rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                style={{\n                  display: \"inline-flex\",\n                  alignItems: \"center\",\n                  gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                  backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                }}\n              >\n                <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                  <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 00-.0785.0371c-.211.3753-.4447.8648-.6083 1.2495-1.8447-.2762-3.68-.2762-5.4868 )}\n            </div>\n          ) : listing.isAuthor ? (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Your reading group is full! Create a Discord server (or use an existing one) and share\n                the invite link so your readers can connect.\n              </p>\n\n              {/* Auto-create option (when Discord bot is configured) */}\n              {listing.discordBotConfigured && !showDiscordManualFallback && (\n                <div className=\"mb-4\">\n                  {!autoDiscordLink ? (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg text-center\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm mb-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        Add the Bookmate bot to your Discord server — it will\n                        automatically create a reading group channel and invite link.\n                      </p>\n                      <button\n                        className=\"btn-primary\"\n                        onClick={handleAutoDiscord}\n                        disabled={autoDiscordLoading}\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"Set Up Discord Automatically\"}\n                      </button>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        <button\n                          className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            color: \"inherit\",\n                            font: \"inherit\",\n                            padding: 0,\n                          }}\n                          onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(true)}\n                        >\n                          Or set up manually\n                        </button>\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  ) : (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.06)\",\n                        border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n                        Almost done! Add the bot to your Discord server:\n                      </p>\n                      <a\n                        href={autoDiscordLink}\n                        target=\"_blank\"\n                        rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"\n                        className=\"btn-primary inline-block\"\n                        style={{\n                          display: \"inline-flex\",\n                          alignItems: \"center\",\n                          gap: \"0.5rem\",\n                          backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\",\n                        }}\n                      >\n                        <svg width=\"18\" height=\"18\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"currentColor\">\n                          <path d=\"M20.317 4.3698a19.7913 19.7913 0 00-4.8851-1.5152.0741.0741 0 2.419 0 1.3332-.946 2.4189-2.1568 2.4189z\"/>\n                        </svg>\n                        Add Bot to Discord Server\n                      </a>\n                      <ol className=\"text-xs mt-3 space-y-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                        <li>Select the server where you want the reading group channel</li>\n                        <li>Authorize the bot with the requested permissions</li>\n                        <li>The bot will create a <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong> channel</li>\n                        <li>An invite link will be automatically generated for your members</li>\n                      </ol>\n                      <p className=\"text-xs mt-3\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}>\n                        After adding the bot, refresh this page to see the invite link.\n                      </p>\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n              )}\n\n              {/* Manual Discord setup */}\n              {(!listing.discordBotConfigured || showDiscordManualFallback) && (\n                <div>\n                  {showDiscordManualFallback && (\n                    <p className=\"text-xs mb-3\">\n                      <button\n                        className=\"underline cursor-pointer\"\n                        style={{\n                          background: \"none\",\n                          border: \"none\",\n                          color: \"#5865F2\",\n                          font: \"inherit\",\n                          padding: 0,\n                        }}\n                        onClick={() => setShowDiscordManualFallback(false)}\n                      >\n                        Back to automatic setup\n                      </button>\n                    </p>\n                  )}\n\n                  <div\n                    className=\"mb-4 p-4 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.05)\", border: \"1px solid rgba(88, 101, 242, 0.15)\" }}\n                  >\n                    <p className=\"text-sm font-semibold mb-2\" style={{ color: \"#5865F2\" }}>\n                      How to create a Discord invite:\n                    </p>\n                    <ol className=\"text-sm space-y-1.5\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", paddingLeft: \"1.25rem\" }}>\n                      <li>Open Discord and create a new server (or use an existing one)</li>\n                      <li>Create a text channel (e.g., <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>#{listing.book_title.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, \"-\").slice(0, 30)}</strong>)</li>\n                      <li>Right-click the channel and select <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Invite People</strong></li>\n                      <li>Click <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Edit invite link</strong> and set it to <strong style={{ color: \"var(--color-text)\" }}>Never expire</strong></li>\n                      <li>Copy the invite link (it looks like <code style={{ backgroundColor: \"rgba(0,0,0,0.06)\", padding: \"0.1rem 0.3rem\", borderRadius: \"0.25rem\", fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}>https://discord.gg/AbCdEfG</code>)</li>\n                      <li>Paste it below and hit Save</li>\n                    </ol>\n                  </div>\n\n                  <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                    <div className=\"flex-1\">\n                      <input\n                        type=\"url\"\n                        className=\"input-field\"\n                        placeholder=\"https://discord.gg/...\"\n                        value={discordLink}\n                        onChange={(e) => setDiscordLink(e.target.value)}\n                        style={{\n                          borderColor: discordLinkError\n                            ? \"var(--color-error)\"\n                            : discordLink && !discordLinkError\n                              ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                              : undefined,\n                        }}\n                      />\n                      {discordLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-error)\" }}>\n                          {discordLinkError}\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                      {discordLink && !discordLinkError && (\n                        <p className=\"text-xs mt-1\" style={{ color: \"var(--color-success)\" }}>\n                          Valid Discord link\n                        </p>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                    <button\n                      className=\"btn-primary\"\n                      onClick={handleDiscordSave}\n                      disabled={discordSaving || !discordLink || !!discordLinkError}\n                      style={{ alignSelf: \"flex-start\", backgroundColor: \"#5865F2\" }}\n                    >\n                      {discordSaving ? \"Saving...\" : \"Save link\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              )}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            <div style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-sm mb-2\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n              >\n                Waiting for the organizer to share the Discord invite link...\n              </p>\n              <p\n                className=\"text-xs\"\n                style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\", opacity: 0.7 }}\n              >\n                The organizer ({listing.author_name}) will share a Discord invite link once\n                they set up the server. Check back soon!\n              </p>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Pending Applicants — visible to author on approval-gated listings */}\n      {listing.isAuthor && !!listing.requires_approval && listing.pendingApplicants.length > 0 && (\n        <div className=\"card mb-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n            Pending Applicants ({listing.pendingApplicants.length})\n          </h2>\n          <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n            {listing.pendingApplicants.map((applicant) => (\n              <div\n                key={applicant.application_id}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n                style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n              >\n                <div\n                  className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                  style={{ backgroundColor: \"#6b7280\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                >\n                  {applicant.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex-1 min-w-0\">\n                  <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">{applicant.display_name}</div>\n                  {applicant.bio && (\n                    <div\n                      className=\"text-xs truncate\"\n                      style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                    >\n                      {applicant.bio}\n                    </div>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"flex gap-2\" style={{ flexShrink: 0 }}>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                      color: \"white\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"approve\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Approve\"}\n                  </button>\n                  <button\n                    className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold cursor-pointer transition-colors\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: \"rgba(192, 57, 43, 0.08)\",\n                      color: \"var(--color-error)\",\n                      border: \"none\",\n                    }}\n                    onClick={() => handleDecision(applicant.application_id, \"reject\")}\n                    disabled={decidingId === applicant.application_id}\n                  >\n                    {decidingId === applicant.application_id ? \"...\" : \"Reject\"}\n                  </button>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            ))}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      {/* Members */}\n      <div className=\"card\">\n        <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-3\">\n          Readers ({listing.memberCount})\n        </h2>\n        <div className=\"space-y-3\">\n          {listing.members.map((member) => (\n            <div\n              key={member.id}\n              className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\n              style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n            >\n              <div\n                className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-bold text-white\"\n                style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n              >\n                {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n              </div>\n              <div>\n                <div className=\"text-sm font-semibold\">\n                  {member.display_name}\n                  {member.id === listing.author_id && (\n                    <span\n                      className=\"ml-2 badge\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor: \"rgba(224, 122, 58, 0.1)\",\n                        color: \"var(--color-accent)\",\n                        fontSize: \"0.6rem\",\n                      }}\n                    >\n                      Organizer\n                    </span>\n                  )}\n                </div>\n                {member.bio && (\n                  <div\n                    className=\"text-xs\"\n                    style={{ color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\" }}\n                  >\n                    {member.bio}\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      {/* Rate Members — visible to members when group is full */}\n      {!!listing.is_full && listing.isMember && (\n        <div className=\"card mt-6\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-lg mb-2\">Rate Your Reading Partners</h2>\n          <p\n            className=\"text-sm mb-4\"\n            style={{\n              color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n              fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n            }}\n          >\n            How was your experience reading with this group? Rate each member to help build the community.\n          </p>\n\n          {ratingMessage && (\n            <p\n              className=\"text-sm mb-3\"\n              style={{\n                color: ratingMessage.includes(\"saved\")\n                  ? \"var(--color-success)\"\n                  : \"var(--color-error)\",\n                fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n              }}\n            >\n              {ratingMessage}\n            </p>\n          )}\n\n          <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n            {listing.members\n              .filter((m) => m.id !== listing.currentUserId)\n              .map((member) => {\n                const existingRating = givenRatings[member.id];\n                const currentScore = ratingScores[member.id] || 0;\n\n                return (\n                  <div\n                    key={member.id}\n                    className=\"p-3 rounded-lg\"\n                    style={{\n                      backgroundColor: existingRating\n                        ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.04)\"\n                        : \"rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.02)\",\n                      border: `1px solid ${\n                        existingRating\n                          ? \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.12)\"\n                          : \"var(--color-border)\"\n                      }`,\n                    }}\n                  >\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2 mb-2\">\n                      <div\n                        className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-white\"\n                        style={{ backgroundColor: \"var(--color-accent)\", flexShrink: 0 }}\n                      >\n                        {member.display_name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}\n                      </div>\n                      <span\n                        className=\"text-sm font-semibold\"\n                        style={{ fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\" }}\n                      >\n                        {member.display_name}\n                      </span>\n                      {existingRating && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"badge ml-auto\"\n                          style={{\n                            backgroundColor: \"rgba(45, 138, 86, 0.1)\",\n                            color: \"var(--color-success)\",\n                            fontSize: \"0.65rem\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          Rated\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n\n                    {/* Star rating */}\n                    <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 mb-2\">\n                      {[1, 2, 3, 4, 5].map((star) => (\n                        <button\n                          key={star}\n                          onClick={() =>\n                            setRatingScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, [member.id]: star }))\n                          }\n                          className=\"transition-transform hover:scale-110\"\n                          style={{\n                            background: \"none\",\n                            border: \"none\",\n                            cursor: \"pointer\",\n                            fontSize: \"1.25rem\",\n                            color:\n                              star <= currentScore\n                                ? \"#f59e0b\"\n                                : \"var(--color-border)\",\n                            padding: \"0 1px\",\n                          }}\n                          aria-label={`${star} star${star !== 1 ? \"s\" : \"\"}`}\n                        >\n                          {star <= currentScore ? \"\\u2605\" : \"\\u2606\"}\n                        </button>\n                      ))}\n                      {currentScore > 0 && (\n                        <span\n                          className=\"text-xs ml-1\"\n                          style={{\n                            color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                            fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                          }}\n                        >\n                          {currentScore}/5\n                        </span>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n\n                    {/* Comment (optional) */}\n                    <input\n                      type=\"text\"\n                      className=\"input-field text-sm mb-2\"\n                      placeholder=\"Optional comment...\"\n                      value={ratingComments[member.id] || \"\"}\n                      onChange={(e) =>\n                        setRatingComments((prev) => ({\n                          ...prev,\n                          [member.id]: e.target.value,\n                        }))\n                      }\n                      style={{ fontSize: \"0.8rem\" }}\n                    />\n\n                    <button\n                      className=\"px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold transition-colors\"\n                      style={{\n                        backgroundColor:\n                          currentScore > 0\n                            ? \"var(--color-accent)\"\n                            : \"var(--color-border)\",\n                        color: currentScore > 0 ? \"white\" : \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n                        border: \"none\",\n                        cursor: currentScore > 0 ? \"pointer\" : \"not-allowed\",\n                        fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n                      }}\n                      onClick={() => handleRatingSubmit(member.id)}\n                      disabled={!currentScore || ratingSaving === member.id}\n                    >\n                      {ratingSaving === member.id\n                        ? \"Saving...\"\n                        : existingRating\n                          ? \"Update Rating\"\n                          : \"Submit Rating\"}\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                );\n              })}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      )}\n\n      <p\n        className=\"text-xs text-center mt-6 mb-4\"\n        style={{\n          color: \"var(--color-text-secondary)\",\n          fontFamily: \"system-ui, sans-serif\",\n        }}\n      >\n        Created by {listing.author_name} on{\" \"}\n        {new Date(listing.created_at).toLocaleDateString(\"en-US\", {\n          month: \"long\",\n          day: \"numeric\",\n          year: \"numeric\",\n        })}\n      </p>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":152,"oldLines":7,"newStart":152,"newLines":8,"lines":["   }, [id]);"," ","   useEffect(() => {","-    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember) {","+    if (listing?.is_full && listing?.isMember && !ratingsFetchedRef.current) {","+      ratingsFetchedRef.current = true;","       fetchRatings();","     }","   }, [listing?.is_full, listing?.isMember, fetchRatings]);"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01F2bAyzVq5Cj2cY3SoySoBr","type":"tool_result","content":"The file /root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts has been updated successfully."}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"224fa423-1059-4cee-9c00-de835cd1f3aa","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:06:32.614Z","tool_use_result":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/route.ts","oldString":"        l.id, l.author_id, l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.book_olid,\n        l.preferred_language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,\n        l.max_group_size, l.is_full, l.requires_approval, l.platform_preference,\n        l.created_at,","newString":"        l.id, l.author_id, l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.book_olid,\n        l.language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,\n        l.max_group_size, l.is_full, l.requires_approval, l.platform_preference,\n        l.created_at,","originalFile":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nconst PAGE_SIZE = 20;\n\n/** Escape LIKE metacharacters so user input is matched literally */\nfunction escapeLike(value: string): string {\n  return value.replace(/[%_\\\\]/g, \"\\\\$&\");\n}\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const { searchParams } = request.nextUrl;\n\n  const q = searchParams.get(\"q\")?.trim() || \"\";\n  const meetingFormat = searchParams.get(\"meeting_format\") || \"\";\n  const readingPace = searchParams.get(\"reading_pace\") || \"\";\n  const startDateFrom = searchParams.get(\"start_date_from\") || \"\";\n  const sort = searchParams.get(\"sort\") || \"newest\";\n  const includePast = searchParams.get(\"include_past\") === \"true\";\n  const pageParam = parseInt(searchParams.get(\"page\") || \"1\", 10);\n  const page = isNaN(pageParam) || pageParam < 1 ? 1 : Math.min(pageParam, 1000);\n\n  const conditions: string[] = [\"l.is_full = 0\"];\n  const params: (string | number)[] = [];\n\n  // Apply date floor: use the more restrictive of today or startDateFrom\n  const today = new Date().toISOString().split(\"T\")[0];\n  const hasStartDateFilter = startDateFrom && /^\\d{4}-\\d{2}-\\d{2}$/.test(startDateFrom);\n\n  if (!includePast) {\n    // Use whichever is later: today or the explicit start_date_from filter\n    const effectiveDate = hasStartDateFilter && startDateFrom > today ? startDateFrom : today;\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(effectiveDate);\n  } else if (hasStartDateFilter) {\n    // includePast is true, but user wants a specific start date floor\n    conditions.push(\"l.start_date >= ?\");\n    params.push(startDateFrom);\n  }\n\n  if (q && q.length <= 300) {\n    conditions.push(\"(l.book_title LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\' OR l.book_author LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\')\");\n    params.push(`%${escapeLike(q)}%`, `%${escapeLike(q)}%`);\n  }\n\n  if (meetingFormat && [\"voice\", \"text\", \"mixed\"].includes(meetingFormat)) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.meeting_format = ?\");\n    params.push(meetingFormat);\n  }\n\n  if (readingPace && readingPace.length <= 200) {\n    conditions.push(\"l.reading_pace LIKE ? ESCAPE '\\\\'\");\n    params.push(`%${escapeLike(readingPace)}%`);\n  }\n\n  const whereClause = conditions.join(\" AND \");\n\n  const ORDER_MAP: Record<string, string> = {\n    newest: \"l.created_at DESC\",\n    oldest: \"l.created_at ASC\",\n    start_date: \"l.start_date ASC\",\n  };\n  const orderClause = ORDER_MAP[sort] ?? \"l.created_at DESC\";\n\n  const offset = (page - 1) * PAGE_SIZE;\n\n  // Get total count for pagination metadata\n  const countResult = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM listings l WHERE ${whereClause}`\n    )\n    .get(...params) as { total: number };\n\n  const listings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT\n        l.id, l.author_id, l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.book_olid,\n        l.preferred_language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,\n        l.max_group_size, l.is_full, l.requires_approval, l.platform_preference,\n        l.created_at,\n        u.display_name as author_name,\n        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = l.id) as member_count\n      FROM listings l\n      JOIN users u ON l.author_id = u.id\n      WHERE ${whereClause}\n      ORDER BY ${orderClause}\n      LIMIT ? OFFSET ?`\n    )\n    .all(...params, PAGE_SIZE, offset);\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    listings,\n    pagination: {\n      page,\n      pageSize: PAGE_SIZE,\n      total: countResult.total,\n      totalPages: Math.ceil(countResult.total / PAGE_SIZE),\n    },\n  });\n}\n","structuredPatch":[{"oldStart":75,"oldLines":7,"newStart":75,"newLines":7,"lines":["     .prepare(","       `SELECT","         l.id, l.author_id, l.book_title, l.book_author, l.book_cover_url, l.book_olid,","-        l.preferred_language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,","+        l.language, l.reading_pace, l.start_date, l.meeting_format,","         l.max_group_size, l.is_full, l.requires_approval, l.platform_preference,","         l.created_at,","         u.display_name as author_name,"]}],"userModified":false,"replaceAll":false}}

() => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/rate-limit\", () => ({\n  checkRateLimit: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({ allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"bcryptjs\", () => ({\n  default: {\n    hash: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"$2a$12$mockedhash\"),\n    compare: vi.fn(),\n  },\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/auth/register/route\");\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/auth/register\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    mockSession.email = undefined;\n    mockSession.displayName = undefined;\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"registers a new user successfully\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"new@example.com\", password: \"password123\", displayName: \"New User\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(201);\n    expect(data).toHaveProperty(\"user\");\n    expect((data as { user: { email: string } }).user.email).toBe(\"new@example.com\");\n\n    const user = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM users WHERE email = ?\").get(\"new@example.com\");\n    expect(user).toBeTruthy();\n    expect(mockSession.save).toHaveBeenCalled();\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when email is missing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { password: \"password123\", displayName: \"User\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when password is too short\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"a@b.com\", password: \"short\", displayName: \"User\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.error).toContain(\"8 characters\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when password exceeds 72 chars\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"a@b.com\", password: \"a\".repeat(73), displayName: \"User\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 409 when email already exists\", async () => {\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(\n      \"taken@example.com\", \"$2a$12$hash\", \"Existing\"\n    );\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"taken@example.com\", password: \"password123\", displayName: \"Another\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(409);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when display name is too long\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"a@b.com\", password: \"password123\", displayName: \"A\".repeat(101) },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"trims and lowercases email\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/register\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"  User@Example.COM  \", password: \"password123\", displayName: \"User\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.user.email).toBe(\"user@example.com\");\n  });\n});\n","numLines":115,"startLine":30,"totalLines":144}}}

listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    42→      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    43→      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    44→      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    45→      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    46→      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    47→    );\n    48→  `);\n    49→  return db;\n    50→});\n    51→\n    52→vi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () 194→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"a6655ab4-4f7a-45c6-916e-a3858cd82d67","uuid":"48b91bd5-835b-4bd2-abb0-db22e38715a6","timestamp":"2026-03-24T15:06:54.897Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/listings/listings.test.ts","content":"    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n      listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn(),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst { GET } = await import(\"@/app/api/listings/route\");\n\nfunction insertUser(email = \"test@example.com\", name = \"Test User\") {\n  testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(email, \"hash\", name);\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\nfunction insertListing(\n  authorId: number,\n  overrides: Partial<{\n    book_title: string;\n    book_author: string;\n    meeting_format: string;\n    is_full: number;\n  }> = {}\n) {\n  testDb.prepare(\n    `INSERT INTO listings (author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size, is_full)\n     VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)`\n  ).run(\n    authorId,\n    overrides.book_title ?? \"Test Book\",\n    overrides.book_author ?? \"Test Author\",\n    \"1ch/wk\",\n    \"2026-04-01\",\n    overrides.meeting_format ?? \"text\",\n    5,\n    overrides.is_full ?? 0\n  );\n  return testDb.prepare(\"SELECT last_insert_rowid() as id\").get().id as number;\n}\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/listings\", () => {\n  let userId: number;\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listing_members\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    userId = insertUser();\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns empty array when no listings exist\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { status, data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: unknown[]; pagination: { page: number; pageSize: number; total: number; totalPages: number } }>(response);\n\n    expect(status).toBe(200);\n    expect(data.listings).toEqual([]);\n    expect(data.pagination).toEqual({\n      page: 1,\n      pageSize: 20,\n      total: 0,\n      totalPages: 0,\n    });\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns open listings only (hides full listings)\", async () => {\n    insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"Open Book\" });\n    insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"Full Book\", is_full: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: { book_title: string }[] }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listings.length).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listings[0].book_title).toBe(\"Open Book\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"includes member count in response\", async () => {\n    const listingId = insertListing(userId);\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, userId);\n\n    const user2 = insertUser(\"user2@example.com\", \"User 2\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\").run(listingId, user2);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: { member_count: number }[] }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listings[0].member_count).toBe(2);\n  });\n\n  // Route uses \"q\" param for search, not \"search\"\n  it(\"supports search by book title via q param\", async () => {\n    insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"The Great Gatsby\" });\n    insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"1984\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings?q=gatsby\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: { book_title: string }[] }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listings.length).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listings[0].book_title).toBe(\"The Great Gatsby\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"supports search by book author via q param\", async () => {\n    insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"Book A\", book_author: \"Tolkien\" });\n    insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"Book B\", book_author: \"Rowling\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings?q=tolkien\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: { book_author: string }[] }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listings.length).toBe(1);\n    expect(data.listings[0].book_author).toBe(\"Tolkien\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"supports filtering by meeting_format\", async () => {\n    insertListing(userId, { meeting_format: \"voice\" });\n    insertListing(userId, { meeting_format: \"text\" });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings?meeting_format=voice\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: unknown[] }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listings.length).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns listings sorted newest first by default (by id descending)\", async () => {\n    const id1 = insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"First\" });\n    const id2 = insertListing(userId, { book_title: \"Second\" });\n\n    // Manually set different created_at timestamps to ensure sort order\n    testDb.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET created_at = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\"2026-03-01 00:00:00\", id1);\n    testDb.prepare(\"UPDATE listings SET created_at = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\"2026-03-02 00:00:00\", id2);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/listings\");\n    const response = await GET(req);\n    const { data } = await parseResponse<{ listings: { book_title: string }[] }>(response);\n\n    expect(data.listings[0].book_title).toBe(\"Second\");\n    expect(data.listings[1].book_title).toBe(\"First\");\n  });\n});\n","numLines":155,"startLine":40,"totalLines":194}}}
